}\n1401\t\n1402\t        Ok(())\n1403\t    }\n1404\t\n1405\t    /// Complete cutover and delete old replica for a shard.\n1406\t    async fn complete_cutover_for_shard(&self, shard_id: u32) -> Result<(), String> {\n1407\t        info!(\n1408\t            shard_id,\n1409\t            \"completing cutover and deleting old replica\"\n1410\t        );\n1411\t\n1412\t        let shard = ShardId(shard_id);\n1413\t        let mut coordinator = self.migration_coordinator.write().await;\n1414\t\n1415\t        // Collect the migrations that affect this shard first\n1416\t        let migrations_to_complete: Vec<_> = coordinator.get_all_migrations()\n1417\t            .iter()\n1418\t            .filter(|(_, migration_state)| migration_state.affected_shards.contains_key(&shard))\n1419\t            .map(|(mid, _)| *mid)\n1420\t            .collect();\n1421\t\n1422\t        // Now complete the cleanup\n1423\t        for mid in migrations_to_complete {\n1424\t            coordinator.complete_drain(mid).map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;\n1425\t            coordinator.complete_cleanup(mid).map_err(|e| e.to_string())?;\n1426\t to stay within memory bounds.\n1466\t    async fn execute_background_migration(\n1467\t        &self,\n1468\t        executor: &Arc<dyn MigrationExecutor>,\n1469\t        migration_id: MigrationId,\n1470\t        shard_id: u32,\n1471\t        old_node_id: &MigrationNodeId,\n1472\t        old_address: &str,\n1473\t        new_node_id: &str,\n1474\t        new_address: &str,\n1475\t       if docs.is_empty() {\n1502\t                break; // No more documents\n1503\t            }\n1504\t\n1505\t            // Write documents to target\n1506\t            executor.write_documents(\n1507\t                new_node_id,\n1508\t                new_address,\n1509\t                index_uid,\n1510\t                docs.clone(),\n1511\t            ).await.map_err(|e| format!(\"write failed: {}\", e))?;\n1512\t\n1513\t            total_docs_copied += docs.len() as u64;\n1514\t            offset += limit;\n1515\t\n1516\t            // Throttle if configured\n1517\t            if self.config.migration_batch_delay_ms > 0 {\n1518\t                tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(\n1519\t                    self.config.migration_batch_delay_ms,\n1520\t                ))\n1521\t                .await;\n1522\t            }\n1523\t        }\n1524\t\n1525\t        // Mark shard migration complete in total_docs_copied)\n1529\t                .map_err(|e| format!(\"failed to mark shard complete: {}\", e))?;\n1530\t        }\n1531\t\n1532\t        // Update metrics\n1533\t        {\n1534\t   InvalidState(String),\n230\t\n231\t    #[error(\"migration error: {0}\")]\n232\t    MigrationError(#[from] MigrationError),\n233\t\n234\t    #[error(\"timeout: {0}\")]\n235\t    Timeout(String),\n236\t\n237\t    #[error(\"cannot remove last node in group\")]\n238\t    CannotRemoveLastNode,\n239\t\n240\t    #[error(\"replica group {0} is not empty\")]\n241\t    GroupNotEmpty(u32),\n242\t}\n243\t\n244\t/// Migration executor: performs the actual document migration between nodes.\n245\t///\n246\t/// This trait allows the rebalancer core to remain agnostic to the HTTP client\n247\t/// implementation while still performing actual migrations.\n248\t#[async_trait::async_trait]\n249\tpub trait MigrationExecutor: Send + Sync {\n250\t    /// Fetch documents from a source node for a specific shard.\n251\t    async fn fetch_documents(\n252\t        &self,\n253\t        source_node: &str,\n254\t        source_address: &str,\n255\t        index_uid: &str,\n256\t        shard_id: u32,\n257\t        limit: u32,\n258\t        offset: u32,\n259\t    ) -> std::result::Result<(Vec<serde_json::Value>, u64), String>;\n260\t\n261\t    /// Write documents to a target node.\n262\t    async fn write_documents(\n263\t        &self,\n264\t        target_node: &str,\n265\t        target_address: &str,\n266\t        index_uid: &str,\n267\t        documents: Vec<serde_json::Value>,\n268\t    ) -> std::result::Result<(), String>;\n269\t\n270\t    /// Delete documents from a node by shard filter.\n271\t    async fn delete_shard(\n272\t        &self,\n273\t        node: &str,\n274\t        node_address: &str,\n275\t        index_uid: &str,\n276\t        shard_id: u32,\n277\t    ) -> std::result::Result<(), String>;\n278\t}\n279\t\n280\t/// Rebalancer metrics for Prometheus emission.\n281\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\n282\tpub struct RebalancerMetrics {\n283\t    /// Total number of documents migrated.\n284\t    pub documents_migrated_total: u64,\n285\t    /// Number of currently active migrations.\n286\t    pub active_migrations: u64,\n287\t    /// Start time of the current rebalance operation.\n288\t    pub rebalance_start_time: Option<Instant>,\n289\t}\n290\t\n291\timpl RebalancerMetrics {\n292\t    /// Record that documents were migrated.\n293\t    pub fn record_documents_migrated(&mut self, count: u64) {\n294\t        self.documents_migrated_total += count;\n295\t    }\n296\t\n297\t    /// Increment active migrations count.\n298\t    pub fn increment_active_migrations(&mut self) {\n299\t        self.active_migrations += 1;\n300\t    }\n301\t\n302\t    /// Decrement active migrations count.\n303\t    pub fn decrement_active_migrations(&mut self) {\n304\t        self.active_migrations = self.active_migrations.saturating_sub(1);\n305\t    }\n306\t\n307\t    /// Start a rebalance operation.\n308\t    pub fn start_rebalance(&mut self) {\n309\t        self.rebalance_start_time = Some(Instant::now());\n310\t    }\n311\t\n312\t    /// End a rebalance operation and return duration in seconds.\n313\t    pub fn end_rebalance(&mut self) -> f64 {\n314\t        self.rebalance_start_time\n315\t            .take()\n316\t            .map(|t| t.elapsed().as_secs_f64())\n317\t            .unwrap_or(0.0)\n318\t    }\n319\t\n320\t    /// Get the current rebalance duration in seconds.\n321\t    pub fn current_duration_secs(&self) -> f64 {\n322\t        self.rebalance_start_time\n323\t            .map(|t| t.elapsed().as_secs_f64())\n324\t            .unwrap_or(0.0)\n325\t    }\n326\t}\n327\t\n328\t/// The cluster rebalancer orchestrates topology changes.\n329\tpub struct Rebalancer {\n330\t    config: RebalancerConfig,\n331\t    topology: Arc<RwLock<Topology>>,\n332\t    migration_coordinator: Arc<RwLock<MigrationCoordinator>>,\n333\t    operations: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<u64, TopologyOperation>>>,\n334\t    next_op_id: Arc<std::sync::atomic::AtomicU64>,\n335\t    active_migrations: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<MigrationId, u64>>>, // migration -> operation ID\n336\t    migration_executor: Option<Arc<dyn MigrationExecutor>>,\n337\t    /// Metrics for rebalancer operations.\n338\t    pub metrics: Arc<RwLock<RebalancerMetrics>>,\n339\t    /// Task store for leader lease (P4.1 background worker).\n340\t    task_store: Option<Arc<dyn TaskStore>>,\n341\t    /// This pod's ID for leader election.\n342\t    pod_id: Option<String>,\n343\t    /// Leader lease scope prefix.\n344\t    leader_scope: String,\n345\t    /// Callback for recording Prometheus metrics.\n346\t    metrics_callback: Option<RebalancerMetricsCallback>,\n347\t}\n348\t\n349\timpl Rebalancer {\n350\t    /// Create a new rebalancer.\n351\t    pub fn new(\n352\t        config: RebalancerConfig,\n353\t        topology: Arc<RwLock<Topology>>,\n354\t        migration_config: MigrationConfig,\n355\t    ) -> Self {\n356\t        let coordinator = Arc::new(RwLock::new(MigrationCoordinator::new(migration_config)));\n357\t\n358\t        Self {\n359\t            config,\n360\t            topology,\n361\t            migration_coordinator: coordinator,\n362\t            operations: Arc::new(RwLock::new(HashMap::new())),\n363\t            next_op_id: Arc::new(std::sync::atomic::AtomicU64::new(1)),\n364\t            active_migrations: Arc::new(RwLock::new(HashMap::new())),\n365\t            migration_executor: None,\n366\t            metrics: Arc::new(RwLock::new(RebalancerMetrics::default())),\n367\t            task_store: None,\n368\t            pod_id: None,\n369\t            leader_scope: \"rebalance:global\".to_string(),\n370\t            metrics_callback: None,\n371\t        }\n372\t    }\n373\t\n374\t    /// Set the task store for leader lease (P4.1 background worker).\n375\t    pub fn with_task_store(mut self, task_store: Arc<dyn TaskStore>) -> Self {\n376\t        self.task_store = Some(task_store);\n377\t        self\n378\t    }\n379\t\n380\t    /// Set the pod ID for leader election.\n381\t    pub fn with_pod_id(mut self, pod_id: String) -> Self {\n382\t        self.pod_id = Some(pod_id);\n383\t        self\n384\t    }\n385\t\n386\t    /// Set the leader lease scope.\n387\t    pub fn with_leader_scope(mut self, scope: String) -> Self {\n388\t        self.leader_scope = scope;\n389\t        self\n390\t    }\n391\t\n392\t    /// Set the metrics callback for Prometheus emission.\n393\t    pub fn with_metrics_callback(mut self, callback: RebalancerMetricsCallback) -> Self {\n394\t        self.metrics_callback = Some(callback);\n395\t        self\n396\t    }\n397\t\n398\t    /// Set the migration executor (provides HTTP client for actual migrations).\n399\t    pub fn with_migration_executor(mut self, executor: Arc<dyn MigrationExecutor>) -> Self {\n400\t        self.migration_executor = Some(executor);\n401\t        self\n402\t    }\n403\t\n404\t    /// Emit a metric via the metrics callback (if configured).\n405\t    fn emit_metric(&self, name: &str, value: f64) {\n406\t        if let Some(ref callback) = self.metrics_callback {\n407\t            callback(name, value);\n408\t        }\n409\t    }\n410\t\n411\t    /// Run the background rebalancer worker (P4.1).\n412\t    ///\n413\t    /// This method runs in a loop, periodically checking for topology changes\n414\t    /// and triggering rebalancing as needed. Uses leader lease to ensure only\n415\t    /// one pod runs the rebalancer at a time.\n416\t    #[instrument(skip_all, fields(pod_id = ?self.pod_id))]\n417\t    pub async fn run_background(&self) -> Result<(), RebalancerError> {\n418\t        let Some(ref task_store) = self.task_store else {\n419\t            return Err(RebalancerError::InvalidState(\n420\t                \"task_store required for background worker\".into(),\n421\t            ));\n422\t        };\n423\t\n424\t        let Some(ref pod_id) = self.pod_id else {\n425\t            return Err(RebalancerError::InvalidState(\n426\t                \"pod_id required for background worker\".into(),\n427\t            ));\n428\t        };\n429\t\n430\t        let check_interval = Duration::from_millis(5000); // Check every 5 seconds\n431\t        let mut interval = tokio::time::interval(check_interval);\n432\t        let mut leader_lease_interval = tokio::time::interval(Duration::from_secs(3));\n433\t\n434\t        info!(\n435\t            config = ?self.config,\n436\t            \"rebalancer background worker started\"\n437\t        );\n438\t\n439\t        loop {\n440\t            tokio::select! {\n441\t                _ = interval.tick() => {\n442\t                    if self.is_leader(task_store, pod_id).await {\n443\t                        if let Err(e) = self.check_and_rebalance().await {\n444\t                            error!(error = %e, \"background rebalance check failed\");\n445\t                        }\n446\t                    }\n447\t                }\n448\t                _ = leader_lease_interval.tick() => {\n449\t                    if self.is_leader(task_store, pod_id).await {\n450\t                        self.renew_leader_lease(task_store, pod_id).await;\n451\t                    }\n452\t                }\n453\t            }\n454\t        }\n455\t    }\n456\t\n457\t    /// Check if this pod is the leader for rebalancing.\n458\t    async fn is_leader(&self, task_store: &Arc<dyn TaskStore>, pod_id: &str) -> bool {\n459\t        let now = now_ms() as i64;\n460\t        let lease_ttl = now + 15000; // 15 second TTL\n461\t\n462\t        task_store\n463\t            .try_acquire_leader_lease(&self.leader_scope, pod_id, lease_ttl, now)\n464\t            .unwrap_or(false)\n465\t    }\n466\t\n467\t    /// Renew the leader lease.\n468\t    async fn renew_leader_lease(&self, task_store: &Arc<dyn TaskStore>, pod_id: &str) {\n469\t        let now = now_ms() as i64;\n470\t        let lease_ttl = now + 15000; // 15 second TTL\n471\t\n472\t        let _ = task_store\n473\t            .renew_leader_lease(&self.leader_scope, pod_id, lease_ttl);\n474\t    }\n475\t\n476\t    /// Check for topology changes and trigger rebalancing if needed.\n477\t    async fn check_and_rebalance(&self) -> Result<(), RebalancerError> {\n478\t        debug!(\"checking for topology changes\");\n479\t\n480\t        let topology = self.topology.read().await;\n481\t\n482\t        // Check for nodes in Joining state\n483\t        let joining_nodes: Vec<_> = topology\n484\t            .nodes()\n485\t            .filter(|n| n.status == NodeStatus::Joining)\n486\t            .map(|n| (n.id.clone(), n.replica_group, n.address.clone()))\n487\t            .collect();\n488\t\n489\t        // Check for nodes in Draining state\n490\t        let draining_nodes: Vec<_> = topology\n491\t            .nodes()\n492\t            .filter(|n| n.status == NodeStatus::Draining)\n493\t            .map(|n| (n.id.clone(), n.replica_group))\n494\t            .collect();\n495\t\n496\t        // Check for nodes in Failed state\n497\t        let failed_nodes: Vec<_> = topology\n498\t            .nodes()\n499\t            .filter(|n| n.status == NodeStatus::Failed)\n500\t            .map(|n| (n.id.clone(), n.replica_group))\n501\t            .collect();\n502\t\n503\t        // Drop topology read lock before starting operations\n504\t        drop(topology);\n505\t\n506\t        // Trigger rebalance for joining nodes\n507\t        for (node_id, replica_group, address) in joining_nodes {\n508\t            info!(node_id = %node_id, replica_group, \"detected joining node\");\n509\t\n510\t            // Check if there's already an operation in progress for this node\n511\t            let ops = self.operations.read().await;\n512\t            let already_in_progress = ops.values().any(|o| {\n513\t                o.target_node.as_ref() == Some(&node_id.as_str().to_string())\n514\t                    && o.status == TopologyOperationStatus::InProgress\n515\t            });\n516\t            drop(ops);\n517\t\n518\t            if !already_in_progress {\n519\t                let request = AddNodeRequest {\n520\t                    id: node_id.as_str().to_string(),\n521\t                    address,\n522\t                    replica_group,\n523\t                };\n524\t                if let Err(e) = self.add_node(request).await {\n525\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to start rebalance for joining node\");\n526\t                }\n527\t            }\n528\t        }\n529\t\n530\t        // Trigger rebalance for draining nodes\n531\t        for (node_id, replica_group) in draining_nodes {\n532\t            info!(node_id = %node_id, replica_group, \"detected draining node\");\n533\t\n534\t            let ops = self.operations.read().await;\n535\t            let already_in_progress = ops.values().any(|o| {\n536\t                o.target_node.as_ref() == Some(&node_id.as_str().to_string())\n537\t                    && matches!(\n538\t                        o.op_type,\n539\t                        TopologyOperationType::DrainNode | TopologyOperationType::RemoveNode\n540\t                    )\n541\t                    && o.status == TopologyOperationStatus::InProgress\n542\t            });\n543\t            drop(ops);\n544\t\n545\t            if !already_in_progress {\n546\t                let request = DrainNodeRequest {\n547\t                    node_id: node_id.as_str().to_string(),\n548\t                    force: false,\n549\t                };\n550\t                if let Err(e) = self.drain_node(request).await {\n551\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to start rebalance for draining node\");\n552\t                }\n553\t            }\n554\t        }\n555\t\n556\t        // Handle failed nodes\n557\t        for (node_id, replica_group) in failed_nodes {\n558\t            info!(node_id = %node_id, replica_group, \"detected failed node\");\n559\t\n560\t            let ops = self.operations.read().await;\n561\t            let already_handled = ops.values().any(|o| {\n562\t                o.target_node.as_ref() == Some(&node_id.as_str().to_string())\n563\t                    && o.op_type == TopologyOperationType::NodeFailure\n564\t            });\n565\t            drop(ops);\n566\t\n567\t            if !already_handled {\n568\t                if let Err(e) = self.handle_node_failure(node_id.as_str()).await {\n569\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to handle node failure\");\n570\t                }\n571\t            }\n572\t        }\n573\t\n574\t        Ok(())\n575\t    }\n576\t\n577\t    /// Get current rebalance status.\n578\t    pub async fn status(&self) -> RebalanceStatus {\n579\t        let ops = self.operations.read().await;\n580\t        let coordinator = self.migration_coordinator.read().await;\n581\t\n582\t        let in_progress = ops.values().any(|o| o.status == TopologyOperationStatus::InProgress);\n583\t\n584\t        let mut migrations: HashMap<String, MigrationStatus> = HashMap::new();\n585\t        for op in ops.values() {\n586\t            for &mid in &op.migrations {\n587\t                if let Some(state) = coordinator.get_state(mid) {\n588\t                    let key = format!(\"{}\", mid);\n589\t                    let status = MigrationStatus {\n590\t                        id: mid.0,\n591\t                        new_node: state.new_node.to_string(),\n592\t                        replica_group: state.replica_group,\n593\t                        phase: state.phase.to_string(),\n594\t                        shards_count: state.affected_shards.len(),\n595\t                        completed_count: state\n596\t                            .affected_shards\n597\t                            .values()\n598\t                            .filter(|s| matches!(s, crate::migration::ShardMigrationState::Active))\n599\t                            .count(),\n600\t                    };\n601\t                    migrations.insert(key, status);\n602\t                }\n603\t            }\n604\t        }\n605\t\n606\t        RebalanceStatus {\n607\t            in_progress,\n608\t            operations: ops.values().cloned().collect(),\n609\t            migrations,\n610\t        }\n611\t    }\n612\t\n613\t    /// Add a node to a replica group.\n614\t    pub async fn add_node(\n615\t        &self,\n616\t        request: AddNodeRequest,\n617\t    ) -> Result<TopologyOperationResult, RebalancerError> {\n618\t        info!(\n619\t            node_id = %request.id,\n620\t            group = request.replica_group,\n621\t            \"starting node addition\"\n622\t        );\n623\t\n624\t        // Check if node already exists\n625\t        {\n626\t            let topo = self.topology.read().await;\n627\t            if topo.node(&TopologyNodeId::new(request.id.clone())).is_some() {\n628\t                return Err(RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\n629\t                    \"node {} already exists\",\n630\t                    request.id\n631\t                )));\n632\t            }\n633\t        }\n634\t\n635\t        // Create operation record\n636\t        let op_id = self.next_op_id.fetch_add(1, std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);\n637\t\n638\t        // Add node to topology in Joining state\n639\t        {\n640\t            let mut topo = self.topology.write().await;\n641\t            let group_count = topo.groups().count() as u32;\n642\t            if request.replica_group >= group_count {\n643\t                return Err(RebalancerError::GroupNotFound(request.replica_group));\n644\t            }\n645\t\n646\t            let node = Node::new(\n647\t                TopologyNodeId::new(request.id.clone()),\n648\t                request.address.clone(),\n649\t                request.replica_group,\n650\t            );\n651\t            topo.add_node(node);\n652\t        }\n653\t\n654\t        // Compute affected shards (shards that will move to new node)\n655\t        let affected_shards = self.compute_shard_moves_for_new_node(&request.id, request.replica_group).await?;\n656\t\n657\t        // Create migration for each affected shard\n658\t        let mut migrations = Vec::new();\n659\t        {\n660\t            let mut coordinator = self.migration_coordinator.write().await;\n661\t\n662\t            for (shard, old_owner) in affected_shards {\n663\t                let mut old_owners = HashMap::new();\n664\t                old_owners.insert(shard, topo_to_migration_node_id(&old_owner));\n665\t\n666\t                let mid = coordinator.begin_migration(\n667\t                    topo_to_migration_node_id(&TopologyNodeId::new(request.id.clone())),\n668\t                    request.replica_group,\n669\t                    old_owners,\n670\t                )?;\n671\t\n672\t                // Start dual-write\n673\t                coordinator.begin_dual_write(mid)?;\n674\t\n675\t                // Track migration\n676\t                {\n677\t                    let mut active = self.active_migrations.write().await;\n678\t                    active.insert(mid, op_id);\n679\t                }\n680\t\n681\t                migrations.push(mid);\n682\t            }\n683\t        }\n684\t\n685\t        // Record operation\n686\t        let node_id_for_result = request.id.clone();\n687\t        let migrations_count = migrations.len();\n688\t        let operation = TopologyOperation {\n689\t            id: op_id,\n690\t            op_type: TopologyOperationType::AddNode,\n691\t            status: TopologyOperationStatus::InProgress,\n692\t            target_node: Some(request.id),\n693\t            target_group: Some(request.replica_group),\n694\t            migrations: migrations.clone(),\n695\t            started_at: Some(now_ms()),\n696\t            completed_at: None,\n697\t            error: None,\n698\t        };\n699\t\n700\t        {\n701\t            let mut ops = self.operations.write().await;\n702\t            ops.insert(op_id, operation);\n703\t        }\n704\t\n705\t        // Start metrics tracking\n706\t        {\n707\t            let mut metrics = self.metrics.write().await;\n708\t            metrics.start_rebalance();\n709\t        }\n710\t\n711\t        // Start background migration task\n712\t        let topo_arc = self.topology.clone();\n713\t        let coord_arc = self.migration_coordinator.clone();\n714\t        let ops_arc = self.operations.clone();\n715\t        let active_arc = self.active_migrations.clone();\n716\t        let config = self.config.clone();\n717\t        let executor = self.migration_executor.clone();\n718\t        let metrics_arc = self.metrics.clone();\n719\t\n720\t        tokio::spawn(async move {\n721\t            if let Err(e) = run_migration_task(\n722\t                topo_arc,\n723\t                coord_arc,\n724\t                ops_arc,\n725\t                active_arc,\n726\t                op_id,\n727\t                migrations,\n728\t                config,\n729\t                executor,\n730\t                metrics_arc,\n731\t            )\n732\t            .await\n733\t            {\n734\t                error!(error = %e, op_id = op_id, \"migration task failed\");\n735\t            }\n736\t        });\n737\t\n738\t        Ok(TopologyOperationResult {\n739\t            id: op_id,\n740\t            message: format!(\n741\t                \"Node {} addition started with {} shard migrations\",\n742\t                node_id_for_result,\n743\t                migrations_count\n744\t            ),\n745\t            migrations_count,\n746\t        })\n747\t    }\n748\t\n749\t    /// Drain a node (prepare for removal).\n750\t    pub async fn drain_node(\n751\t        &self,\n752\t        request: DrainNodeRequest,\n753\t    ) -> Result<TopologyOperationResult, RebalancerError> {\n754\t        info!(node_id = %request.node_id, \"starting node drain\");\n755\t\n756\t        // Check if node exists\n757\t        let node_id = TopologyNodeId::new(request.node_id.clone());\n758\t        let (node_status, replica_group) = {\n759\t            let topo = self.topology.read().await;\n760\t            let node = topo.node(&node_id).ok_or_else(|| {\n761\t                RebalancerError::NodeNotFound(request.node_id.clone())\n762\t            })?;\n763\t\n764\t            // Check if this is the last node in the group\n765\t            let group = topo\n766\t                .groups()\n767\t                .find(|g| g.id == node.replica_group)\n768\t                .ok_or_else(|| RebalancerError::GroupNotFound(node.replica_group))?;\n769\t\n770\t            if group.nodes().len() <= 1 {\n771\t                return Err(RebalancerError::CannotRemoveLastNode);\n772\t            }\n773\t\n774\t            (node.status, node.replica_group)\n775\t        };\n776\t\n777\t        if node_status == NodeStatus::Draining {\n778\t            return Err(RebalancerError::OperationInProgress(\n779\t                request.node_id.clone(),\n780\t            ));\n781\t        }\n782\t\n783\t        // Create operation record\n784\t        let op_id = self.next_op_id.fetch_add(1, std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);\n785\t\n786\t        // Mark node as draining\n787\t        {\n788\t            let mut topo = self.topology.write().await;\n789\t            if let Some(node) = topo.node_mut(&node_id) {\n790\t                node.status = NodeStatus::Draining;\n791\t            }\n792\t        }\n793\t\n794\t        // Compute shard destinations (where each shard goes)\n795\t        let shard_destinations = self.compute_shard_destinations_for_drain(&request.node_id, replica_group).await?;\n796\t\n797\t        // Create migrations for each shard\n798\t        let mut migrations = Vec::new();\n799\t        {\n800\t            let mut coordinator = self.migration_coordinator.write().await;\n801\t\n802\t            for (shard, dest_node) in shard_destinations {\n803\t                let mid = coordinator.begin_migration(\n804\t                    topo_to_migration_node_id(&dest_node),\n805\t                    replica_group,\n806\t                    [(shard, topo_to_migration_node_id(&node_id))].into_iter().collect(),\n807\t                )?;\n808\t\n809\t                coordinator.begin_dual_write(mid)?;\n810\t\n811\t                {\n812\t                    let mut active = self.active_migrations.write().await;\n813\t                    active.insert(mid, op_id);\n814\t                }\n815\t\n816\t                migrations.push(mid);\n817\t            }\n818\t        }\n819\t\n820\t        // Record operation\n821\t        let operation = TopologyOperation {\n822\t            id: op_id,\n823\t            op_type: TopologyOperationType::DrainNode,\n824\t            status: TopologyOperationStatus::InProgress,\n825\t            target_node: Some(request.node_id.clone()),\n826\t            target_group: Some(replica_group),\n827\t            migrations: migrations.clone(),\n828\t            started_at: Some(now_ms()),\n829\t            completed_at: None,\n830\t            error: None,\n831\t        };\n832\t\n833\t        {\n834\t            let mut ops = self.operations.write().await;\n835\t            ops.insert(op_id, operation);\n836\t        }\n837\t\n838\t        // Start metrics tracking\n839\t        {\n840\t            let mut metrics = self.metrics.write().await;\n841\t            metrics.start_rebalance();\n842\t        }\n843\t\n844\t        // Start background migration task\n845\t        let migrations_count = migrations.len();\n846\t        let topo_arc = self.topology.clone();\n847\t        let coord_arc = self.migration_coordinator.clone();\n848\t        let ops_arc = self.operations.clone();\n849\t        let active_arc = self.active_migrations.clone();\n850\t        let config = self.config.clone();\n851\t        let drain_node_id = request.node_id.clone();\n852\t        let executor = self.migration_executor.clone();\n853\t        let metrics_arc = self.metrics.clone();\n854\t\n855\t        tokio::spawn(async move {\n856\t            if let Err(e) = run_drain_task(\n857\t                topo_arc,\n858\t                coord_arc,\n859\t                ops_arc,\n860\t                active_arc,\n861\t                op_id,\n862\t                migrations,\n863\t                config,\n864\t                drain_node_id,\n865\t                executor,\n866\t                metrics_arc,\n867\t            )\n868\t            .await\n869\t            {\n870\t                error!(error = %e, op_id = op_id, \"drain task failed\");\n871\t            }\n872\t        });\n873\t\n874\t        Ok(TopologyOperationResult {\n875\t            id: op_id,\n876\t            message: format!(\n877\t                \"Node {} drain started with {} shard migrations\",\n878\t                request.node_id,\n879\t                migrations_count\n880\t            ),\n881\t            migrations_count,\n882\t        })\n883\t    }\n884\t\n885\t    /// Remove a node from the cluster (after drain).\n886\t    pub async fn remove_node(\n887\t        &self,\n888\t        request: RemoveNodeRequest,\n889\t    ) -> Result<TopologyOperationResult, RebalancerError> {\n890\t        info!(node_id = %request.node_id, force = request.force, \"starting node removal\");\n891\t\n892\t        let node_id = TopologyNodeId::new(request.node_id.clone());\n893\t\n894\t        // Check node state\n895\t        let node_status = {\n896\t            let topo = self.topology.read().await;\n897\t            let node = topo.node(&node_id).ok_or_else(|| {\n898\t                RebalancerError::NodeNotFound(request.node_id.clone())\n899\t            })?;\n900\t\n901\t            // Check if this is the last node in the group\n902\t            let group = topo\n903\t                .groups()\n904\t                .find(|g| g.id == node.replica_group)\n905\t                .ok_or_else(|| RebalancerError::GroupNotFound(node.replica_group))?;\n906\t\n907\t            if group.nodes().len() <= 1 {\n908\t                return Err(RebalancerError::CannotRemoveLastNode);\n909\t            }\n910\t\n911\t            node.status\n912\t        };\n913\t\n914\t        if !request.force && node_status != NodeStatus::Draining {\n915\t            return Err(RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\n916\t                \"node {} is not in draining state (current: {:?}), use force=true to bypass\",\n917\t                request.node_id, node_status\n918\t            )));\n919\t        }\n920\t\n921\t        // Create operation record\n922\t        let op_id = self.next_op_id.fetch_add(1, std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);\n923\t\n924\t        // Remove node from topology\n925\t        {\n926\t            let mut topo = self.topology.write().await;\n927\t            topo.remove_node(&node_id);\n928\t        }\n929\t\n930\t        // Record operation\n931\t        let operation = TopologyOperation {\n932\t            id: op_id,\n933\t            op_type: TopologyOperationType::RemoveNode,\n934\t            status: TopologyOperationStatus::Complete,\n935\t            target_node: Some(request.node_id.clone()),\n936\t            target_group: None,\n937\t            migrations: Vec::new(),\n938\t            started_at: Some(now_ms()),\n939\t            completed_at: Some(now_ms()),\n940\t            error: None,\n941\t        };\n942\t\n943\t        {\n944\t            let mut ops = self.operations.write().await;\n945\t            ops.insert(op_id, operation);\n946\t        }\n947\t\n948\t        Ok(TopologyOperationResult {\n949\t            id: op_id,\n950\t            message: format!(\"Node {} removed from cluster\", request.node_id),\n951\t            migrations_count: 0,\n952\t        })\n953\t    }\n954\t\n955\t    /// Add a replica group.\n956\t    pub async fn add_replica_group(\n957\t        &self,\n958\t        request: AddReplicaGroupRequest,\n959\t    ) -> Result<TopologyOperationResult, RebalancerError> {\n960\t        info!(group_id = request.group_id, node_count = request.nodes.len(), \"starting replica group addition\");\n961\t\n962\t        // Check if group already exists\n963\t        {\n964\t            let topo = self.topology.read().await;\n965\t            if topo.groups().any(|g| g.id == request.group_id) {\n966\t                return Err(RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\n967\t                    \"replica group {} already exists\",\n968\t                    request.group_id\n969\t                )));\n970\t            }\n971\t        }\n972\t\n973\t        // Create operation record\n974\t        let op_id = self.next_op_id.fetch_add(1, std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);\n975\t\n976\t        // Add nodes to topology\n977\t        let node_ids: Vec<String> = request.nodes.iter().map(|n| n.id.clone()).collect();\n978\t        for node_spec in &request.nodes {\n979\t            let mut topo = self.topology.write().await;\n980\t            let node = Node::new(\n981\t                TopologyNodeId::new(node_spec.id.clone()),\n982\t                node_spec.address.clone(),\n983\t                request.group_id,\n984\t            );\n985\t            topo.add_node(node);\n986\t        }\n987\t\n988\t        // For replica groups, we don't migrate data - the new group will sync from existing groups\n989\t        // This is handled by the replication mechanism\n990\t\n991\t        // Record operation\n992\t        let operation = TopologyOperation {\n993\t            id: op_id,\n994\t            op_type: TopologyOperationType::AddReplicaGroup,\n995\t            status: TopologyOperationStatus::Complete,\n996\t            target_node: None,\n997\t            target_group: Some(request.group_id),\n998\t            migrations: Vec::new(),\n999\t            started_at: Some(now_ms()),\n1000\t            completed_at: Some(now_ms()),\n1001\t            error: None,\n1002\t        };\n1003\t\n1004\t        {\n1005\t            let mut ops = self.operations.write().await;\n1006\t            ops.insert(op_id, operation);\n1007\t        }\n1008\t\n1009\t        Ok(TopologyOperationResult {\n1010\t            id: op_id,\n1011\t            message: format!(\n1012\t                \"Replica group {} added with {} nodes\",\n1013\t                request.group_id,\n1014\t                node_ids.len()\n1015\t            ),\n1016\t            migrations_count: 0,\n1017\t        })\n1018\t    }\n1019\t\n1020\t    /// Remove a replica group.\n1021\t    pub async fn remove_replica_group(\n1022\t        &self,\n1023\t        request: RemoveReplicaGroupRequest,\n1024\t    ) -> Result<TopologyOperationResult, RebalancerError> {\n1025\t        info!(group_id = request.group_id, force = request.force, \"starting replica group removal\");\n1026\t\n1027\t        // Check if group exists and is empty\n1028\t        {\n1029\t            let topo = self.topology.read().await;\n1030\t            let group = topo.groups().find(|g| g.id == request.group_id);\n1031\t\n1032\t            let Some(grp) = group else {\n1033\t                return Err(RebalancerError::GroupNotFound(request.group_id));\n1034\t            };\n1035\t\n1036\t            if !request.force && !grp.nodes().is_empty() {\n1037\t                return Err(RebalancerError::GroupNotEmpty(request.group_id));\n1038\t            }\n1039\t\n1040\t            // Check if this is the last group\n1041\t            if topo.groups().count() <= 1 {\n1042\t                return Err(RebalancerError::InvalidState(\n1043\t                    \"cannot remove the last replica group\".into(),\n1044\t                ));\n1045\t            }\n1046\t        }\n1047\t\n1048\t        // Create operation record\n1049\t        let op_id = self.next_op_id.fetch_add(1, std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);\n1050\t\n1051\t        // Remove group from topology (this removes all nodes in the group)\n1052\t        {\n1053\t            let mut topo = self.topology.write().await;\n1054\t            topo.remove_group(request.group_id);\n1055\t        }\n1056\t\n1057\t        // Record operation\n1058\t        let operation = TopologyOperation {\n1059\t            id: op_id,\n1060\t            op_type: TopologyOperationType::RemoveReplicaGroup,\n1061\t            status: TopologyOperationStatus::Complete,\n1062\t            target_node: None,\n1063\t            target_group: Some(request.group_id),\n1064\t            migrations: Vec::new(),\n1065\t            started_at: Some(now_ms()),\n1066\t            completed_at: Some(now_ms()),\n1067\t            error: None,\n1068\t        };\n1069\t\n1070\t        {\n1071\t            let mut ops = self.operations.write().await;\n1072\t            ops.insert(op_id, operation);\n1073\t        }\n1074\t\n1075\t        Ok(TopologyOperationResult {\n1076\t            id: op_id,\n1077\t            message: format!(\"Replica group {} removed from cluster\", request.group_id),\n1078\t            migrations_count: 0,\n1079\t        })\n1080\t    }\n1081\t\n1082\t    /// Handle a node failure.\n1083\t    pub async fn handle_node_failure(\n1084\t        &self,\n1085\t        node_id: &str,\n1086\t    ) -> Result<TopologyOperationResult, RebalancerError> {\n1087\t        warn!(node_id = %node_id, \"handling node failure\");\n1088\t\n1089\t        let node_id_obj = TopologyNodeId::new(node_id.to_string());\n1090\t\n1091\t        // Mark node as failed\n1092\t        let replica_group = {\n1093\t            let mut topo = self.topology.write().await;\n1094\t            let node = topo.node_mut(&node_id_obj).ok_or_else(|| {\n1095\t                RebalancerError::NodeNotFound(node_id.to_string())\n1096\t            })?;\n1097\t\n1098\t            node.status = NodeStatus::Failed;\n1099\t            node.replica_group\n1100\t        };\n1101\t\n1102\t        // Create operation record\n1103\t        let op_id = self.next_op_id.fetch_add(1, std::sync::atomic::Ordering::SeqCst);\n1104\t\n1105\t        // TODO: Schedule background replication to restore RF if needed\n1106\t        // For now, just record the failure\n1107\t\n1108\t        let operation = TopologyOperation {\n1109\t            id: op_id,\n1110\t            op_type: TopologyOperationType::NodeFailure,\n1111\t            status: TopologyOperationStatus::Complete,\n1112\t            target_node: Some(node_id.to_string()),\n1113\t            target_group: Some(replica_group),\n1114\t            migrations: Vec::new(),\n1115\t            started_at: Some(now_ms()),\n1116\t            completed_at: Some(now_ms()),\n1117\t            error: None,\n1118\t        };\n1119\t\n1120\t        {\n1121\t            let mut ops = self.operations.write().await;\n1122\t            ops.insert(op_id, operation);\n1123\t        }\n1124\t\n1125\t        Ok(TopologyOperationResult {\n1126\t            id: op_id,\n1127\t            message: format!(\"Node {} marked as failed\", node_id),\n1128\t            migrations_count: 0,\n1129\t        })\n1130\t    }\n1131\t\n1132\t    /// Compute which shards should move to a new node.\n1133\t    /// Returns shard -> old_owner mapping for shards that will move.\n1134\t    ///\n1135\t    /// For each shard where the new node enters the assignment, we select one\n1136\t    /// of the old owners as the migration source. If the new node displaced\n1137\t    /// an old owner, we use that node; otherwise we use the lowest-scored old owner.\n1138\t    async fn compute_shard_moves_for_new_node(\n1139\t        &self,\n1140\t        new_node_id: &str,\n1141\t        replica_group: u32,\n1142\t    ) -> Result<Vec<(ShardId, TopologyNodeId)>, RebalancerError> {\n1143\t        let topo = self.topology.read().await;\n1144\t\n1145\t        let new_node_id = TopologyNodeId::new(new_node_id.to_string());\n1146\t        let rf = topo.rf();\n1147\t\n1148\t        // Find the target group\n1149\t        let group = topo\n1150\t            .groups()\n1151\t            .find(|g| g.id == replica_group)\n1152\t            .ok_or_else(|| RebalancerError::GroupNotFound(replica_group))?;\n1153\t\n1154\t        let existing_nodes: Vec<_> = group.nodes().iter().cloned().collect();\n1155\t        let mut affected_shards = Vec::new();\n1156\t\n1157\t        // For each shard, check if the new node is in the new assignment\n1158\t        for shard_id in 0..topo.shards {\n1159\t            let old_assignment: Vec<_> = assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, &existing_nodes, rf)\n1160\t                .into_iter()\n1161\t                .collect();\n1162\t\n1163\t            // New assignment with the new node included\n1164\t            let all_nodes: Vec<_> = existing_nodes\n1165\t                .iter()\n1166\t                .cloned()\n1167\t                .chain(std::iter::once(new_node_id.clone()))\n1168\t                .collect();\n1169\t            let new_assignment: Vec<_> = assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, &all_nodes, rf)\n1170\t                .into_iter()\n1171\t                .collect();\n1172\t\n1173\t            // Check if new node is in the new assignment\n1174\t            if !new_assignment.contains(&new_node_id) {\n1175\t                continue;\n1176\t            }\n1177\t\n1178\t            // Find the source node for migration\n1179\t            // Priority 1: Use the displaced node (if any)\n1180\t            // Priority 2: Use the lowest-scored old owner (load balancing)\n1181\t            let source_node = if let Some(displaced) = old_assignment.iter()\n1182\t                .find(|n| !new_assignment.contains(n)) {\n1183\t                // An old node was displaced - use it as source\n1184\t                displaced.clone()\n1185\t            } else {\n1186\t                // No displacement - pick lowest-scored old owner\n1187\t                // Find the old owner with the minimum rendezvous score\n1188\t                let mut min_score = u64::MAX;\n1189\t                let mut min_node = old_assignment.first().cloned()\n1190\t                    .unwrap_or_else(|| existing_nodes.first().unwrap().clone());\n1191\t\n1192\t                for old_node in &old_assignment {\n1193\t                    let s = score(shard_id, old_node.as_str());\n1194\t                    if s < min_score {\n1195\t                        min_score = s;\n1196\t                        min_node = old_node.clone();\n1197\t                    }\n1198\t                }\n1199\t                min_node\n1200\t            };\n1201\t\n1202\t            affected_shards.push((ShardId(shard_id), source_node));\n1203\t        }\n1204\t\n1205\t        Ok(affected_shards)\n1206\t    }\n1207\t\n1208\t    /// Compute where each shard should go when draining a node.\n1209\t    /// Returns shard -> destination_node mapping.\n1210\t    async fn compute_shard_destinations_for_drain(\n1211\t        &self,\n1212\t        drain_node_id: &str,\n1213\t        replica_group: u32,\n1214\t    ) -> Result<Vec<(ShardId, TopologyNodeId)>, RebalancerError> {\n1215\t        let topo = self.topology.read().await;\n1216\t\n1217\t        let drain_node_id = TopologyNodeId::new(drain_node_id.to_string());\n1218\t        let rf = topo.rf();\n1219\t\n1220\t        // Find the target group\n1221\t        let group = topo\n1222\t            .groups()\n1223\t            .find(|g| g.id == replica_group)\n1224\t            .ok_or_else(|| RebalancerError::GroupNotFound(replica_group))?;\n1225\t\n1226\t        let other_nodes: Vec<_> = group\n1227\t            .nodes()\n1228\t            .iter()\n1229\t            .filter(|n| **n != drain_node_id)\n1230\t            .cloned()\n1231\t            .collect();\n1232\t\n1233\t        if other_nodes.is_empty() {\n1234\t            return Err(RebalancerError::CannotRemoveLastNode);\n1235\t        }\n1236\t\n1237\t        let mut destinations = Vec::new();\n1238\t\n1239\t        // For each shard, find a new owner among the remaining nodes\n1240\t        for shard_id in 0..topo.shards {\n1241\t            // Check if the draining node is in the assignment for this shard\n1242\t            let assignment: Vec<_> = assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n1243\t\n1244\t            if assignment.contains(&drain_node_id) {\n1245\t                // This shard needs a new home\n1246\t                // Use rendezvous hash to pick the best remaining node\n1247\t                let mut best_node = None;\n1248\t                let mut best_score = 0u64;\n1249\t\n1250\t                for node in &other_nodes {\n1251\t                    let s = score(shard_id, node.as_str());\n1252\t                    if s > best_score {\n1253\t                        best_score = s;\n1254\t                        best_node = Some(node.clone());\n1255\t                    }\n1256\t                }\n1257\t\n1258\t                if let Some(dest) = best_node {\n1259\t                    destinations.push((ShardId(shard_id), dest));\n1260\t                }\n1261\t            }\n1262\t        }\n1263\t\n1264\t        Ok(destinations)\n1265\t    }\n1266\t}\n1267\t\n1268\t/// Background task to run migrations for a topology operation.\n1269\tasync fn run_migration_task(\n1270\t    topology: Arc<RwLock<Topology>>,\n1271\t    coordinator: Arc<RwLock<MigrationCoordinator>>,\n1272\t    operations: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<u64, TopologyOperation>>>,\n1273\t    active_migrations: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<MigrationId, u64>>>,\n1274\t    op_id: u64,\n1275\t    migrations: Vec<MigrationId>,\n1276\t    config: RebalancerConfig,\n1277\t    executor: Option<Arc<dyn MigrationExecutor>>,\n1278\t    metrics: Arc<RwLock<RebalancerMetrics>>,\n1279\t) -> Result<(), RebalancerError> {\n1280\t    let Some(exec) = executor else {\n1281\t        // No executor - simulate completion for testing\n1282\t        for mid in migrations {\n1283\t            tokio::time::sleep(tokio::time::Duration::from_millis(\n1284\t                config.migration_batch_delay_ms,\n1285\t            ))\n1286\t            .await;\n1287\t\n1288\t            let shards_to_complete = {\n1289\t                let coord = coordinator.read().await;\n1290\t                if let Some(state) = coord.get_state(mid) {\n1291\t                    state.old_owners.keys().copied().collect::<Vec<_>>()\n1292\t                } else {\n1293\t                    continue;\n1294\t                }\n1295\t            };\n1296\t\n1297\t            let docs_per_shard = 1000u64;\n1298\t            {\n1299\t                let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1300\t                for shard in &shards_to_complete {\n1301\t                    coord.shard_migration_complete(mid, *shard, docs_per_shard)?;\n1302\t                }\n1303\t            }\n1304\t\n1305\t            // Record metrics for simulated migration\n1306\t            {\n1307\t                let mut metrics_guard = metrics.write().await;\n1308\t                metrics_guard.record_documents_migrated(docs_per_shard * shards_to_complete.len() as u64);\n1309\t            }\n1310\t\n1311\t            {\n1312\t                let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1313\t                coord.begin_cutover(mid)?;\n1314\t                coord.complete_drain(mid)?;\n1315\t                coord.complete_cleanup(mid)?;\n1316\t            }\n1317\t\n1318\t            {\n1319\t                let mut active = active_migrations.write().await;\n1320\t                active.remove(&mid);\n1321\t            }\n1322\t        }\n1323\t\n1324\t        // Mark operation as complete\n1325\t        {\n1326\t            let mut ops = operations.write().await;\n1327\t            if let Some(op) = ops.get_mut(&op_id) {\n1328\t                op.status = TopologyOperationStatus::Complete;\n1329\t                op.completed_at = Some(now_ms());\n1330\t            }\n1331\t        }\n1332\t\n1333\t        // Mark new node as active\n1334\t        {\n1335\t            let mut topo = topology.write().await;\n1336\t            let ops = operations.read().await;\n1337\t            if let Some(op) = ops.get(&op_id) {\n1338\t                if let Some(ref node_id) = op.target_node {\n1339\t                    let node_id = TopologyNodeId::new(node_id.clone());\n1340\t                    if let Some(node) = topo.node_mut(&node_id) {\n1341\t                        node.status = NodeStatus::Active;\n1342\t                    }\n1343\t                }\n1344\t            }\n1345\t        }\n1346\t\n1347\t        return Ok(());\n1348\t    };\n1349\t\n1350\t    // With executor - perform actual migration\n1351\t    // For each migration (each shard that moves to the new node)\n1352\t    for mid in migrations {\n1353\t        // Get migration state to find source/target info\n1354\t        let (new_node, _replica_group, old_owners, index_uid) = {\n1355\t            let coord = coordinator.read().await;\n1356\t            let state = coord.get_state(mid).ok_or_else(|| {\n1357\t                RebalancerError::InvalidState(\"migration state not found\".into())\n1358\t            })?;\n1359\t\n1360\t            // Use a default index for now - in production, this would come from config\n1361\t            let index_uid = \"default\".to_string();\n1362\t\n1363\t            (\n1364\t                state.new_node.to_string(),\n1365\t                state.replica_group,\n1366\t                state.old_owners.clone(),\n1367\t                index_uid,\n1368\t            )\n1369\t        };\n1370\t\n1371\t        // Get node addresses\n1372\t        let (new_node_address, old_owner_addresses) = {\n1373\t            let topo = topology.read().await;\n1374\t            let new_addr = topo.node(&TopologyNodeId::new(new_node.to_string()))\n1375\t                .ok_or_else(|| RebalancerError::NodeNotFound(new_node.to_string()))?\n1376\t                .address.clone();\n1377\t\n1378\t            let mut old_addrs = HashMap::new();\n1379\t            for (shard, old_node) in &old_owners {\n1380\t                if let Some(node) = topo.node(&migration_to_topo_node_id(old_node)) {\n1381\t                    old_addrs.insert(*shard, node.address.clone());\n1382\t                }\n1383\t            }\n1384\t\n1385\t            (new_addr, old_addrs)\n1386\t        };\n1387\t\n1388\t        let mut migration_total_docs = 0u64;\n1389\t\n1390\t        // For each shard in the migration\n1391\t        for (shard_id, old_node_id) in &old_owners {\n1392\t            let old_address = old_owner_addresses.get(shard_id)\n1393\t                .ok_or_else(|| RebalancerError::InvalidState(\"old node address not found\".into()))?;\n1394\t\n1395\t            info!(\n1396\t                migration_id = %mid,\n1397\t                shard_id = shard_id.0,\n1398\t                from = %old_node_id.0,\n1399\t                to = %new_node,\n1400\t                \"starting shard migration\"\n1401\t            );\n1402\t\n1403\t            // Paginate through all documents for this shard\n1404\t            let mut offset = 0u32;\n1405\t            let limit = config.migration_batch_size;\n1406\t            let mut total_docs_copied = 0u64;\n1407\t\n1408\t            loop {\n1409\t                // Fetch documents from source\n1410\t                let (docs, _total) = exec.fetch_documents(\n1411\t                    &old_node_id.0,\n1412\t                    old_address,\n1413\t                    &index_uid,\n1414\t                    shard_id.0,\n1415\t                    limit,\n1416\t                    offset,\n1417\t                ).await.map_err(|e| {\n1418\t                    RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\"fetch failed: {}\", e))\n1419\t                    })?;\n1420\t\n1421\t                if docs.is_empty() {\n1422\t                    break; // No more documents\n1423\t                }\n1424\t\n1425\t                // Write documents to target\n1426\t                exec.write_documents(\n1427\t                    &new_node,\n1428\t                    &new_node_address,\n1429\t                    &index_uid,\n1430\t                    docs.clone(),\n1431\t                ).await.map_err(|e| {\n1432\t                    RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\"write failed: {}\", e))\n1433\t                    })?;\n1434\t\n1435\t                total_docs_copied += docs.len() as u64;\n1436\t                offset += limit;\n1437\t\n1438\t                // Throttle if configured\n1439\t                if config.migration_batch_delay_ms > 0 {\n1440\t                    tokio::time::sleep(tokio::time::Duration::from_millis(\n1441\t                        config.migration_batch_delay_ms,\n1442\t                    ))\n1443\t                    .await;\n1444\t                }\n1445\t            }\n1446\t\n1447\t            // Mark shard migration complete\n1448\t            {\n1449\t                let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1450\t                coord.shard_migration_complete(mid, *shard_id, total_docs_copied)?;\n1451\t            }\n1452\t\n1453\t            migration_total_docs += total_docs_copied;\n1454\t\n1455\t            info!(\n1456\t                migration_id = %mid,\n1457\t                shard_id = shard_id.0,\n1458\t                docs_copied = total_docs_copied,\n1459\t                \"shard migration complete\"\n1460\t            );\n1461\t        }\n1462\t\n1463\t        // Record metrics for this migration\n1464\t        {\n1465\t            let mut metrics_guard = metrics.write().await;\n1466\t            metrics_guard.record_documents_migrated(migration_total_docs);\n1467\t        }\n1468\t\n1469\t        // All shards for this migration complete - begin cutover\n1470\t        {\n1471\t            let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1472\t            coord.begin_cutover(mid)?;\n1473\t        }\n1474\t\n1475\t        // Delta pass: re-read from source to catch stragglers\n1476\t        for (shard_id, old_node_id) in &old_owners {\n1477\t            let old_address = old_owner_addresses.get(shard_id).unwrap();\n1478\t\n1479\t            let (docs, _) = exec.fetch_documents(\n1480\t                &old_node_id.0,\n1481\t                old_address,\n1482\t                &index_uid,\n1483\t                shard_id.0,\n1484\t                config.migration_batch_size,\n1485\t                0,\n1486\t            ).await.map_err(|e| {\n1487\t                RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\"delta fetch failed: {}\", e))\n1488\t            })?;\n1489\t\n1490\t            if !docs.is_empty() {\n1491\t                // Write any stragglers to target\n1492\t                exec.write_documents(\n1493\t                    &new_node,\n1494\t                    &new_node_address,\n1495\t                    &index_uid,\n1496\t                    docs,\n1497\t                ).await.map_err(|e| {\n1498\t                    RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\"delta write failed: {}\", e))\n1499\t                    })?;\n1500\t            }\n1501\t\n1502\t            // Mark delta complete\n1503\t            {\n1504\t                let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1505\t                // Complete drain after delta pass\n1506\t                coord.complete_drain(mid)?;\n1507\t            }\n1508\t        }\n1509\t\n1510\t        // Activate shards\n1511\t        {\n1512\t            let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1513\t            coord.complete_cleanup(mid)?;\n1514\t        }\n1515\t\n1516\t        // Delete migrated shards from old nodes\n1517\t        for (shard_id, old_node_id) in &old_owners {\n1518\t            let old_address = old_owner_addresses.get(shard_id).unwrap();\n1519\t\n1520\t            if let Err(e) = exec.delete_shard(\n1521\t                &old_node_id.0,\n1522\t                old_address,\n1523\t                &index_uid,\n1524\t                shard_id.0,\n1525\t            ).await {\n1526\t                warn!(\n1527\t                    shard_id = shard_id.0,\n1528\t                    node = %old_node_id.0,\n1529\t                    error = %e,\n1530\t                    \"failed to delete migrated shard from old node (may need manual cleanup)\"\n1531\t                );\n1532\t            }\n1533\t        }\n1534\t\n1535\t        // Remove from active migrations\n1536\t        {\n1537\t            let mut active = active_migrations.write().await;\n1538\t            active.remove(&mid);\n1539\t        }\n1540\t    }\n1541\t\n1542\t    // Mark operation as complete\n1543\t    {\n1544\t        let mut ops = operations.write().await;\n1545\t        if let Some(op) = ops.get_mut(&op_id) {\n1546\t            op.status = TopologyOperationStatus::Complete;\n1547\t            op.completed_at = Some(now_ms());\n1548\t        }\n1549\t    }\n1550\t\n1551\t    // Mark new node as active\n1552\t    {\n1553\t        let mut topo = topology.write().await;\n1554\t        let ops = operations.read().await;\n1555\t        if let Some(op) = ops.get(&op_id) {\n1556\t            if let Some(ref node_id) = op.target_node {\n1557\t                let node_id = TopologyNodeId::new(node_id.clone());\n1558\t                if let Some(node) = topo.node_mut(&node_id) {\n1559\t                    node.status = NodeStatus::Active;\n1560\t                }\n1561\t            }\n1562\t        }\n1563\t    }\n1564\t\n1565\t    Ok(())\n1566\t}\n1567\t\n1568\t/// Background task to run drain migrations for a node.\n1569\tasync fn run_drain_task(\n1570\t    topology: Arc<RwLock<Topology>>,\n1571\t    coordinator: Arc<RwLock<MigrationCoordinator>>,\n1572\t    operations: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<u64, TopologyOperation>>>,\n1573\t    active_migrations: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<MigrationId, u64>>>,\n1574\t    op_id: u64,\n1575\t    migrations: Vec<MigrationId>,\n1576\t    config: RebalancerConfig,\n1577\t    drain_node_id: String,\n1578\t    executor: Option<Arc<dyn MigrationExecutor>>,\n1579\t    metrics: Arc<RwLock<RebalancerMetrics>>,\n1580\t) -> Result<(), RebalancerError> {\n1581\t    let Some(exec) = executor else {\n1582\t        // No executor - simulate completion for testing\n1583\t        for mid in migrations {\n1584\t            tokio::time::sleep(tokio::time::Duration::from_millis(\n1585\t                config.migration_batch_delay_ms,\n1586\t            ))\n1587\t            .await;\n1588\t\n1589\t            let shards_to_complete = {\n1590\t                let coord = coordinator.read().await;\n1591\t                if let Some(state) = coord.get_state(mid) {\n1592\t                    state.old_owners.keys().copied().collect::<Vec<_>>()\n1593\t                } else {\n1594\t                    continue;\n1595\t                }\n1596\t            };\n1597\t\n1598\t            let docs_per_shard = 1000u64;\n1599\t            {\n1600\t                let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1601\t                for shard in &shards_to_complete {\n1602\t                    coord.shard_migration_complete(mid, *shard, docs_per_shard)?;\n1603\t                }\n1604\t            }\n1605\t\n1606\t            // Record metrics for simulated migration\n1607\t            {\n1608\t                let mut metrics_guard = metrics.write().await;\n1609\t                metrics_guard.record_documents_migrated(docs_per_shard * shards_to_complete.len() as u64);\n1610\t            }\n1611\t\n1612\t            {\n1613\t                let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1614\t                coord.begin_cutover(mid)?;\n1615\t                coord.complete_drain(mid)?;\n1616\t                coord.complete_cleanup(mid)?;\n1617\t            }\n1618\t\n1619\t            {\n1620\t                let mut active = active_migrations.write().await;\n1621\t                active.remove(&mid);\n1622\t            }\n1623\t        }\n1624\t\n1625\t        // Mark operation as complete\n1626\t        {\n1627\t            let mut ops = operations.write().await;\n1628\t            if let Some(op) = ops.get_mut(&op_id) {\n1629\t                op.status = TopologyOperationStatus::Complete;\n1630\t                op.completed_at = Some(now_ms());\n1631\t            }\n1632\t        }\n1633\t\n1634\t        // Mark drained node as removed (operator can delete PVC)\n1635\t        {\n1636\t            let mut topo = topology.write().await;\n1637\t            let node_id = TopologyNodeId::new(drain_node_id);\n1638\t            if };\n1645\t\n1646\t    // With executor - perform actual drain migration\n1647\t    // For each migration (each shard being drained from the node)\n1648\t    for mid in migrations {\n1649\t        // coord.get_state(mid).ok_or_else(|| {\n1653\t                RebalancerError::InvalidState(\"migration state not found\".into())\n1654\t            })?;\n1655\t\n1656\t            // Use a default state.replica_group,\n1662\t                state.old_owners.clone(),\n1663\t                index_uid,\n1664\t            )\n1665\t        };\n1666\t\n1667\t        // Get node addresses\n1668\t RebalancerError::NodeNotFound(drain_node_id.clone()))?\n1673\t                .address.clone();\n1674\t\n1675\t            let new_addr = topo.node(&TopologyNodeId::new(new_node.to_string()))\n1676\t                .ok_or_else(|| RebalancerError::NodeNotFound(new_node.to_string()))?\n1677\t                .address.clone();\n1678\t\n1679\t            (drain_id, drain_addr, new_addr)\n1680\t        };\n1681\t\n1682\t        // For each shard being drained\n1683\t        for (shard_id, _old_node) in &old_owners {\n1684\t            info!(\n1685\t                migration_id = %mid,\n1686\t                shard_id = shard_id.0,\n1687\t                from = %drain_node_id,\n1688\t                to = %new_node,\n1689\t                \"starting shard drain\"\n1690\t            );\n1691\t\n1692\t            // Paginate through all documents for this shard on the draining node\n1693\t            let mut offset = 0u32;\n1694\t            let limit = config.migration_batch_size;\n1695\t            let mut total_docs_copied = 0u64;\n1696\t\n1697\t            loop {\n1698\t                // Fetch documents from draining node\n1699\t                let (docs, _total) = exec.fetch_documents(\n1700\t                    &drain_node_id,\n1701\t                    &drain_node_address,\n1702\t                    &index_uid,\n1703\t                    shard_id.0,\n1704\t                    limit,\n1705\t                    offset,\n1706\t                ).await.map_err(|e| {\n1707\t                    RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\"fetch         // Write documents to new node\n1715\t                exec.write_documents(\n1716\t                    &new_node,\n1717\t                    &new_node_address,\n1718\t                    &index_uid,\n1719\t                    docs.clone(),\n1720\t                ).await.map_err(|e| {\n1721\t                    RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\"write failed: {}\", e))\n1722\t                })?;\n1723\t\n1724\t                total_docs_copied += docs.len() as u64;\n1725\t                offset += limit;\n1726\t\n1727\t                if config.migration_batch_delay_ms > 0 {\n1728\t                    tokio::time::sleep(tokio::time::Duration::from_millis(\n1729\t                        config.migration_batch_delay_ms,\n1730\t                    ))\n1731\t                    .await;\n1732\t                }\n1733\t            }\n1734\t\n1735\t            // Mark shard migration complete\n1736\t            {\n1737\t                let mut coord = migration_id = %mid,\n1743\t                shard_id = shard_id.0,\n1744\t                docs_copied = total_docs_copied,\n1745\t                \"shard drain complete\"\n1746\t            );\n1747\t        }\n1748\t\n1749\t        // All shards for this migration complete - begin cutover\n1750\t        {\n1751\t            let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1752\t            coord.begin_cutover(mid)?;\n1753\t        }\n1754\t\n1755\t        // Delta pass: re-read from draining node to catch stragglers\n1756\t        for (shard_id, _old_node) in &old_owners {\n1757\t            let (docs, _) = exec.fetch_documents(\n1758\t                &drain_node_id,\n1759\t                &drain_node_address,\n1760\t                &index_uid,\n1761\t                shard_id.0,\n1762\t                config.migration_batch_size,\n1763\t                0,\n1764\t            ).await.map_err(|e| {\n1765\t                RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\"delta exec.write_documents(\n1771\t                    &new_node,\n1772\t                    &new_node_address,\n1773\t                    &index_uid,\n1774\t                    docs,\n1775\t                ).await.map_err(|e| {\n1776\t                    RebalancerError::InvalidState(format!(\"delta write failed: {}\", e))\n1777\t                })?;\n1778\t            }\n1779\t\n1780\t            {\n1781\t                let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1782\t                coord.complete_drain(mid)?;\n1783\t            }\n1784\t        }\n1785\t\n1786\t        // Activate shards and complete cleanup\n1787\t        {\n1788\t            let mut coord = coordinator.write().await;\n1789\t            coord.complete_cleanup(mid)?;\n1790\t        }\n1791\t\n1792\t        // Delete drained shards from the draining node\n1793\t        for (shard_id, _old_node) in &old_owners {\n1794\t            if let Err(e) = exec.delete_shard(\n1795\t                &drain_node_id,\n1796\t                &drain_node_address,\n1797\t                &index_uid,\n1798\t                shard_id.0,\n1799\t            ).await {\n1800\t                warn!(\n1801\t                    shard_id = shard_id.0,\n1802\t                    node = %drain_node_id,\n1803\t                    error = %e,\n1804\t                    \"failed to delete drained shard (may need manual cleanup)\"\n1805\t                );\n1806\t            }\n1807\t        }\n1808\t\n1809\t        {\n1810\t            let mut active = active_migrations.write().await;\n1811\t            active.remove(&mid);\n1812\t        }\n1813\t    }\n1814\t\n1815\t    // Mark operation as complete\n1816\t    {\n1817\t        let mut ops = operations.write().await;\n1818\t        if let Some(op) = ops.get_mut(&op_id) {\n1819\t            op.status = TopologyOperationStatus::Complete;\n1820\t            op.completed_at = Some(now_ms());\n1821\t        }\n1822\t    }\n1823\t\n1824\t    // Mark drained node as removed (operator can delete PVC)\n1825\t    {\n1826\t        let mut topo = topology.write().await;\n1827\t        let node_id = TopologyNodeId::new(drain_node_id);\n1828\t        if let Some(node) = since Unix epoch.\n1837\tfn now_ms() -> u64 {\n1838\t    std::time::SystemTime::now()\n1839\t        .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n1840\t        .unwrap_or_default()\n1841\t        .as_millis() as u64\n1842\t}\n1843\t\n1844\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n1845\t// HttpMigrationExecutor - Actual HTTP-based document migration\n1846\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n1847\t\n1848\t/// HTTP-based migration executor for moving documents between Meilisearch nodes.\n1849\t///\n1850\t/// This implements the `MigrationExecutor` trait by making actual HTTP requests\n1851\t/// to Meilisearch nodes' APIs. It uses the `_miroir_shard` filterable attribute\n1852\t/// to fetch only the documents belonging to a specific shard.\n1853\tpub struct HttpMigrationExecutor {\n1854\t    /// Master key for authenticating with Meilisearch nodes.\n1855\t    node_master_key: String,\n1856\t    /// HTTP client for making requests to nodes.\n1857\t    client: reqwest::Client,\n1858\t}\n1859\t\n1860\timpl HttpMigrationExecutor {\n1861\t    /// Create a new HTTP migration executor.\n1862\t    ///\n1863\t    /// # Arguments\n1864\t    /// * `node_master_key` - Master key for authenticating with Meilisearch nodes\n1865\t    /// * `node_timeout_ms` - Timeout for HTTP requests to nodes (milliseconds)\n1866\t    pub fn new(node_master_key: String, node_timeout_ms: u64) -> Self {\n1867\t        let timeout = std::time::Duration::from_millis(node_timeout_ms);\n1868\t\n1869\t        let client = reqwest::Client::builder()\n1870\t            .timeout(timeout)\n1871\t            .build()\n1872\t            .expect(\"Failed to create HTTP client for migration executor\");\n1873\t\n1874\t        Self {\n1875\t            node_master_key,\n1876\t            client,\n1877\t        }\n1878\t    }\n1879\t\n1880\t    /// Build the filter string for fetching documents by shard.\n1881\t    fn shard_filter(&self, shard_id: u32) -> String {\n1882\t        format!(\"_miroir_shard = {}\", shard_id)\n1883\t    }\n1884\t\n1885\t    /// Make an authenticated GET request to a node.\n1886\t    async fn get_node(\n1887\t        &self,\n1888\t        node_address: &str,\n1889\t        path: &str,\n1890\t    ) -> std::result::Result<reqwest::Response, String> {\n1891\t        let url = if node_address.ends_with('/') {\n1892\t            format!(\"{}{}\", node_address, path.trim_start_matches('/'))\n1893\t        } else {\n1894\t            format!(\"{}/{}\", node_address.trim_end_matches('/'), path.trim_start_matches('/'))\n1895\t        };\n1896\t\n1897\t        self.client\n1898\t            .get(&url)\n1899\t            .header(\"Authorization\", format!(\"Bearer {}\", self.node_master_key))\n1900\t            .send()\n1901\t            .await\n1902\t            .map_err(|e| format!(\"GET {} failed: {}\", url, e))\n1903\t    }\n1904\t\n1905\t    /// Make an authenticated POST request to a node.\n1906\t    async fn post_node(\n1907\t        &self,\n1908\t        node_address: &str,\n1909\t        path: &str,\n1910\t        body: serde_json::Value,\n1911\t    ) -> std::result::Result<reqwest::Response, String> {\n1912\t        let url = if node_address.ends_with('/') {\n1913\t            format!(\"{}{}\", node_address, path.trim_start_matches('/'))\n1914\t        } else {\n1915\t            format!(\"{}/{}\", node_address.trim_end_matches('/'), path.trim_start_matches('/'))\n1916\t        };\n1917\t\n1918\t        self.client\n1919\t            .post(&url)\n1920\t            .header(\"Authorization\", format!(\"Bearer {}\", self.node_master_key))\n1921\t            .json(&body)\n1922\t            .send()\n1923\t            .await\n1924\t            .map_err(|e| format!(\"POST {} failed: {}\", url, e))\n1925\t    }\n1926\t}\n1927\t\n1928\t#[async_trait::async_trait]\n1929\timpl MigrationExecutor for HttpMigrationExecutor {\n1930\t    /// Fetch documents from a source node for a specific shard.\n1931\t    ///\n1932\t    /// Uses the `_miroir_shard` filterable attribute to retrieve only documents\n1933\t    /// belonging to the specified shard, avoiding full index scans.\n1934\t    async fn fetch_documents(\n1935\t        &self,\n1936\t        _source_node: &str,\n1937\t        source_address: &str,\n1938\t        index_uid: &str,\n1939\t        shard_id: u32,\n1940\t        limit: u32,\n1941\t        offset: u32,\n1942\t    ) -> std::result::Result<(Vec<serde_json::Value>, u64), String> {\n1943\t        let filter = self.shard_filter(shard_id);\n1944\t        let path = format!(\n1945\t            \"indexes/{}/documents?filter={}&limit={}&offset={}\",\n1946\t            index_uid,\n1947\t            urlencoding::encode(&filter),\n1948\t            limit,\n1949\t            offset\n1950\t        );\n1951\t\n1952\t        let response = self.get_node(source_address, &path).await?;\n1953\t\n1954\t        if !response.status().is_success() {\n1955\t            let status = response.status();\n1956\t            let error_text = response.text().await.unwrap_or_else(|_| \"unable to read error\".to_string());\n1957\t            return Err(format!(\n1958\t                \"Failed to fetch documents from {}: HTTP {} - {}\",\n1959\t                source_address, status, error_text\n1960\t            ));\n1961\t        }\n1962\t\n1963\t        let json_body: TTL worker — background sweeper for document expiration (plan §13.14).\n2\t//!\n3\t//! Each pod runs a TTL sweeper that deletes expired documents from its\n4\t//! rendezvous-owned shards (Mode A scaling). Uses leader election to ensure\n5\t//! only one pod performs the sweep per index.\n6\t//!\n7\t//! ## Sweep Algorithm\n8\t//!\n9\t//! For each owned shard:\n10\t//! 1. Build filter: `_miroir_shard = {s} AND _miroir_expires_at <= {now_ms}`\n11\t//! 2. POST /indexes/{uid}/documents/delete with the filter\n12\t//! 3. }\n61\t}\n62\t\n63\t/// TTL worker — runs the background TTL sweeper with leader election.\n64\tpub struct TtlWorker<C: NodeClient> {\n65\t    /// TTL manager that performs the actual sweeps.\n66\t );\n144\t\n145\t        // Start the TTL manager background sweeper\n146\t        self.manager.start().await;\n147\t\n148\t        let scope = \"ttl_sweeper\";\n149\t\n150\t        loop {\n151\t })\n163\t            .await\n164\t            {\n165\t                Ok(Ok(true)) => {\n166\t                    info!(\n167\t                        pod_id = %self.pod_id,\n168\t                        scope,\n169\t                        \"TTL worker acquired leader lease\"\n170\t                    );\n171\t\n172\t                    // We are the leader - run leader loop with lease renewal\n173\t                    if let Err(e) = self.run_leader_loop().await {\n174\t                        error!(error = %e, \"TTL worker leader loop failed\");\n175\t                    }\n176\t                }\n177\t                Ok(Ok(false)) => {\n178\t                    debug!(\"Failed to acquire TTL worker leader lease: already held\");\n179\t                }\n180\t                Ok(Err(e)) => {\n181\t                    error!(\"Failed to acquire TTL worker leader lease: {}\", e);\n182\t                }\n183\t                Err(e) => {\n184\t                    error!(\"Failed to spawn leader lease acquisition: {}\", e);\n185\t                }\n186\t            }\n187\t\n188\t            // Check if still running\n189\t            {\n190\t                let running = self.running.read().await;\n191\t                if !*running {\n192\t                    info!(\"TTL worker stopping\");\n193\t                    return Ok(());\n194\t                }\n195\t            }\n196\t\n197\t            // Wait before retrying lease acquisition\n198\t            tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(\n199\t                self.config.lease_renewal_interval_ms,\n200\t            ))\n201\t            .await;\n202\t        }\n203\t    }\n204\t\n205\t    /// Run the leader loop with lease renewal.\n206\t    async fn run_leader_loop(&self) -> Result<()> {\n207\t        let scope = \"ttl_sweeper\";\n208\t        let mut lease_renewal = tokio::time::interval(Duration::from_millis(\n209\t            self.config.lease_renewal_interval_ms,\n210\t        ));\n211\t\n212\t        loop {\n213\t            // Check if still running\n214\t            {\n215\t                let running = self.running.read().await;\n216\t                if !*running {\n217\t                    info!(\"TTL worker leader stopping\");\n218\t                    return Ok(());\n219\t                }\n220\t            }\n221\t\n222\t            tokio::select! {\n223\t                _ = lease_renewal.tick() => {\n224\t                    // Renew lease\n225\t                    let now_ms = now_ms();\n226\t                    let expires_at = now_ms + (self.config.lease_ttl_secs * 1000) as i64;\n227\t\n228\t                    match tokio::task::spawn_blocking({\n229\t                        let task_store = self.task_store.clone();\n230\t                        let scope = scope.to_string();\n231\t                        let pod_id = self.pod_id.clone();\n232\t                        move || {\n233\t                            task_store.renew_leader_lease(&scope, &pod_id, expires_at)\n234\t                        }\n235\t                    })\n236\t                    .await\n237\t                    {\n238\t                        Ok(Ok(true)) => {\n239\t                            debug!(\"TTL worker leader lease renewed\");\n240\t                        }\n241\t                        Ok(Ok(false)) => {\n242\t                            info!(\"TTL worker lost leader lease\");\n243\t                            return Ok(());\n244\t                        }\n245\t                        Ok(Err(e)) => {\n246\t                            error!(\"Failed to renew TTL worker leader lease: {}\", e);\n247\t                            return Err(MiroirError::TaskStore(e.to_string()));\n248\t                        }\n249\t                        Err(e) => {\n250\t                            error!(\"Failed to spawn lease renewal: {}\", e);\n251\t                            return Err(MiroirError::TaskStore(e.to_string()));\n252\t                        }\n253\t                    }\n254\t                }\n255\t            }\n256\t        }\n257\t    }\n258\t\n259\t    /// Stop the TTL worker.\n260\t    pub async fn stop(&self) {\n261\t        *self.running.write().await = false;\n262\t        self.manager.stop().await;\n263\t    }\n264\t\n265\t    /// Get the TTL manager state.\n266\t    pub async fn state(&self) -> crate::ttl::TtlSweeperState {\n267\t        self.manager.state().await\n268\t    }\n269\t}\n270\t\n271\t/// Get .as_millis() as i64\n277\t}\n278\t\n279\t#[cfg(test)]\n280\tmod tests {\n281\t    use super::*;\n282\t    use crate::scatter::MockNodeClient;\n283\t    use crate::topology::{Node, {\n82\t    /// Per-group ACK counts: group_id -> successful_ack_count\n83\t    group_acks: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n84\t    /// Per-group total node counts: group_id -> total_nodes_attempted\n85\t degraded_groups: u32,\n90\t}\n91\t\n92\timpl QuorumState {\n93\t    /// Record a write attempt to a node.\n94\t    fn record_attempt(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n95\t        *self.group_totals.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n96\t    }\n97\t\n98\t    /// Record a successful write ACK from a node.\n99\t    fn record_success(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n100\t        *self.group_acks.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n101\t    }\n102\t\n103\t    /// Record a failed write attempt from a node.\n104\t    fn record_failure(&mut self, _group_id: u32) {\n105\t        // Track that this group had a failure\n106\t        // Degraded is determined after checking quorum\n107\t    }\n108\t\n109\t    /// Check if a group has met quorum: floor(RF/2) + 1 ACKs required.\n110\t    fn check_group_quorum(&mut self, group_id: u32, rf: usize) -> bool {\n111\t        let acks = *self.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n112\t        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n113\t        let met = acks >= quorum;\n114\t        *self.groups_met_quorum.entry(group_id).or_insert(false) = met;\n115\t        met\n116\t    }\n117\t\n118\t    /// Count how many groups met quorum.\n119\t    fn count_quorum_groups(&self) -> usize {\n120\t        self.groups_met_quorum.values().filter(|&&v| v).count()\n121\t    }\n122\t\n123\t    /// Count degraded groups (groups that exist but didn't meet quorum).\n124\t    fn count_degraded_groups(&mut self, replica_group_count: u32, rf: usize) -> u32 {\n125\t        let mut degraded = 0u32;\n126\t        for group_id in self.group_totals.contains_key(&group_id) {\n130\t                    degraded += 1;\n131\t                }\n132\t            }\n133\t        }\n134\t        degraded\n135\t    }\n136\t}\n137\t\n138\t/// Build router for document endpoints.\n139\tpub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\n140\twhere\n141\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n142\t{\n143\t    Router::new()\n144\t
