            index_uid: index.clone(),\n215\t                ids,\n216\t                origin: None,\n217\t            };\n218\t            return delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state, %index, session_id))]\n249\tasync fn write_documents_impl(\n250\t    index: String,\n251\t    primary_key: Option<String>,\n252\t    mut documents: Vec<Value>,\n253\t    state: &AppState,\n254\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n255\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n256\t    if documents.is_empty() {\n257\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n258\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n259\t            \"cannot write empty document batch\",\n260\t        ));\n261\t    }\n262\t\n263\t    // 1. Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n264\t    // Aliases are resolved before any processing; writes to multi-target aliases are rejected\n265\t    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n266\t        // Check if the index is an alias\n267\t        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n268\t        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n269\t            // It was an alias\n270\t            // Check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only, ILM-managed)\n271\t            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n272\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n273\t                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n274\t                    format!(\n275\t                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); writes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n276\t                        index\n277\t                    ),\n278\t                ));\n279\t            }\n280\t            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n281\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n282\t            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n283\t        } else {\n284\t            // Not an alias, use the index name as-is\n285\t            index.clone()\n286\t        }\n287\t    } else {\n288\t        index.clone()\n289\t    };\n290\t\n291\t    // 1. Extract primary key from first document if not provided\n292\t    let primary_key = primary_key.or_else(|| {\n293\t        documents\n294\t            .first()\n295\t            .and_then(|doc| extract_primary_key(doc))\n296\t    });\n297\t\n298\t    let primary_key = primary_key.ok_or_else(|| {\n299\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n300\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n301\t            format!(\"primary key required for index `{}`\", index),\n302\t        )\n303\t    })?;\n304\t\n305\t    // 2. Validate all documents have the primary key and check for reserved field\n306\t    let anti_entropy_enabled = state.config.anti_entropy.enabled;\n307\t    let updated_at_field = &state.config.anti_entropy.updated_at_field;\n308\t    let ttl_enabled = state.config.ttl.enabled;\n309\t    let expires_at_field = &state.config.ttl.expires_at_field;\n310\t\n311\t    for (i, doc) in documents.iter().enumerate() {\n312\t        // Check for reserved field BEFORE checking primary key (per acceptance criteria)\n313\t        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved (plan §5)\n314\t        if doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some() {\n315\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n316\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n317\t                \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\",\n318\t            ));\n319\t        }\n320\t\n321\t        // _miroir_updated_at is reserved ONLY when anti_entropy.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.8)\n322\t        if anti_entropy_enabled && doc.get(updated_at_field).is_some() {\n323\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n324\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n325\t                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", updated_at_field),\n326\t            ));\n327\t        }\n328\t\n329\t        // _miroir_expires_at is reserved ONLY when ttl.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.14)\n330\t        // When reserved, clients cannot SET it; the orchestrator controls it. When disabled,\n331\t        // client values pass through end-to-end.\n332\t        if ttl_enabled && doc.get(expires_at_field).is_some() {\n333\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n334\t                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n335\t                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when ttl.enabled: true)\", expires_at_field),\n336\t            ));\n337\t        }\n338\t\n339\t        if doc.get(&primary_key).is_none() {\n340\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n341\t                MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n342\t                format!(\n343\t                    \"document at index {} missing primary key field `{}`\",\n344\t                    i, primary_key\n345\t                ),\n346\t            ));\n347\t        }\n348\t    }\n349\t\n350\t    // 3. Inject _miroir_shard into each document\n351\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n352\t    let shard_count = topology.shards;\n353\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n354\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n355\t\n356\t    for doc in &mut documents {\n357\t        if let Some(pk_value) = doc.get(&primary_key).and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n358\t            let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, shard_count);\n359\t            doc[\"_miroir_shard\"] = serde_json::json!(shard_id);\n360\t        }\n361\t    }\n362\t\n363\t    // 4. Group documents by target nodes (per-batch grouping for efficient fan-out)\n364\t    let node_documents = group_documents_by_shard(&documents, &primary_key, &topology)?;\n365\t\n366\t    // 5. Fan out to nodes and track quorum\n367\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n368\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n369\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n370\t    );\n371\t\n372\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n373\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n374\t\n375\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group (with dual-write support)\n376\t    for (shard_id, docs) in node_documents {\n377\t        // Get migration coordinator reference for dual-write detection\n378\t        let migration_coordinator = state.migration_coordinator.as_ref().map(|c| {\n379\t            // We need a read lock on the coordinator\n380\t            tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n381\t                tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n382\t                    c.read().await\n383\t                })\n384\t            })\n385\t        });\n386\t\n387\t        // Use migration-aware routing\n388\t        let targets = write_targets_with_migration(\n389\t            shard_id,\n390\t            &topology,\n391\t            migration_coordinator.as_deref(),\n392\t        );\n393\t\n394\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n395\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n396\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n397\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n398\t            ));\n399\t        }\n400\t\n401\t        // Track which groups we're targeting for this shard\n402\t\n403\t        for node_id in targets {\n404\t            let node = topology\n405\t                .node(&node_id)\n406\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n407\t\n408\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n409\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n410\t\n411\t            let req = WriteRequest {\n412\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n413\t                documents: docs.clone(),\n414\t                primary_key: Some(primary_key.clone()),\n415\t                origin: None,\n416\t            };\n417\t\n418\t            match client.write_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n419\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n420\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n421\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n422\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n423\t                    }\n424\t                }\n425\t                Ok(resp) => {\n426\t                    // Non-success response (validation error, etc.)\n427\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n428\t                }\n429\t                Err(_) => {\n430\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n431\t                }\n432\t            }\n433\t        }\n434\t    }\n435\t\n436\t    // 6. Apply two-rule quorum logic\n437\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n438\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n439\t\n440\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n441\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n442\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n443\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n444\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n445\t        ));\n446\t    }\n447\t\n448\t    // 6.5. Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n449\t    // Groups are checked in ascending order, so the first one with quorum is the first\n450\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n451\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n452\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n453\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n454\t            acks >= quorum\n455\t        })\n456\t        .unwrap_or(0); // Default to group 0 if somehow no quorum (shouldn't happen here)\n457\t\n458\t    // 7. Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n459\t    let miroir_task = state\n460\t        .task_registry\n461\t        .register_with_metadata(\n462\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n463\t            Some(index_uid.clone()),\n464\t            Some(\"documentAdditionOrUpdate\".to_string()),\n465\t        )\n466\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n467\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n468\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n469\t        ))?;\n470\t\n471\t    // 7.5. Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n472\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n473\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n474\t            sid,\n475\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n476\t            first_quorum_group,\n477\t        ).await {\n478\t            // Log error but don't fail the write - session pinning is best-effort\n479\t            tracing::error!(\n480\t                session_id = %sid,\n481\t                error = %e,\n482\t                \"failed to record session pinning for write\"\n483\t            );\n484\t        }\n485\t    }\n486\t\n487\t    // Build success response with degraded header and mtask ID\n488\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n489\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n490\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n491\t            indexUid: Some(index_uid.clone()),\n492\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n493\t            error: None,\n494\t            error_type: None,\n495\t            code: None,\n496\t            link: None,\n497\t        },\n498\t        degraded_groups,\n499\t    )\n500\t}\n501\t\n502\t/// Implementation for delete by IDs.\n503\tasync fn delete_by_ids_impl(\n504\t    index: String,\n505\t    req: DeleteByIdsRequest,\n506\t    state: &AppState,\n507\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n508\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n509\t    if req.ids.is_empty() {\n510\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n511\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n512\t            \"cannot delete empty ID list\",\n513\t        ));\n514\t    }\n515\t\n516\t    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n517\t    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n518\t        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n519\t        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n520\t            // It was an alias - check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only)\n521\t            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n522\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n523\t                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n524\t                    format!(\n525\t                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); deletes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n526\t                        index\n527\t                    ),\n528\t                ));\n529\t            }\n530\t            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n531\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n532\t            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n533\t        } else {\n534\t            index.clone()\n535\t        }\n536\t    } else {\n537\t        index.clone()\n538\t    };\n539\t\n540\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n541\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n542\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n543\t\n544\t    // Group IDs by target shard for independent per-shard routing\n545\t    let mut shard_ids: HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = HashMap::new();\n546\t    for id in &req.ids {\n547\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, topology.shards);\n548\t        shard_ids.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.clone());\n549\t    }\n550\t\n551\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n552\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n553\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n554\t    );\n555\t\n556\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n557\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n558\t\n559\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group\n560\t    for (shard_id, ids) in shard_ids {\n561\t        let targets = miroir_core::router::write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n562\t\n563\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n564\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n565\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n566\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n567\t            ));\n568\t        }\n569\t\n570\t        for node_id in targets {\n571\t            let node = topology\n572\t                .node(&node_id)\n573\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n574\t\n575\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n576\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n577\t\n578\t            let delete_req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n579\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n580\t                ids: ids.clone(),\n581\t                origin: None,\n582\t            };\n583\t\n584\t            match client.delete_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &delete_req).await {\n585\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n586\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n587\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n588\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n589\t                    }\n590\t                }\n591\t                Ok(resp) => {\n592\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n593\t                }\n594\t                Err(_) => {\n595\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n596\t                }\n597\t            }\n598\t        }\n599\t    }\n600\t\n601\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n602\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n603\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n604\t\n605\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n606\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n607\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n608\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n609\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n610\t        ));\n611\t    }\n612\t\n613\t    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n614\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n615\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n616\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n617\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n618\t            acks >= quorum\n619\t        })\n620\t        .unwrap_or(0);\n621\t\n622\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n623\t    let miroir_task = state\n624\t        .task_registry\n625\t        .register_with_metadata(\n626\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n627\t            Some(index.clone()),\n628\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n629\t        )\n630\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n631\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n632\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n633\t        ))?;\n634\t\n635\t    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n636\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n637\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n638\t            sid,\n639\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n640\t            first_quorum_group,\n641\t        ).await {\n642\t            tracing::error!(\n643\t                session_id = %sid,\n644\t                error = %e,\n645\t                \"failed to record session pinning for delete\"\n646\t            );\n647\t        }\n648\t    }\n649\t\n650\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n651\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n652\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n653\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n654\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n655\t            error: None,\n656\t            error_type: None,\n657\t            code: None,\n658\t            link: None,\n659\t        },\n660\t        degraded_groups,\n661\t    )\n662\t}\n663\t\n664\t/// Implementation for delete by filter (broadcast to all nodes).\n665\tasync fn delete_by_filter_impl(\n666\t    index: String,\n667\t    req: DeleteByFilterRequest,\n668\t    state: &AppState,\n669\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n670\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n671\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n672\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n673\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n674\t\n675\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n676\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n677\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n678\t    );\n679\t\n680\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n681\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n682\t\n683\t    // Broadcast to all nodes (cannot shard-route for filters)\n684\t    for node in topology.nodes() {\n685\t        let group_id = node.replica_group;\n686\t        quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node.id);\n687\t\n688\t        match client\n689\t            .delete_documents_by_filter(&node.id, &node.address, &req)\n690\t            .await\n691\t        {\n692\t            Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n693\t                quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node.id);\n694\t                if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n695\t                    node_task_uids.insert(node.id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n696\t                }\n697\t            }\n698\t            Ok(resp) => {\n699\t                return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n700\t            }\n701\t            Err(_) => {\n702\t                quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n703\t            }\n704\t        }\n705\t    }\n706\t\n707\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n708\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n709\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n710\t\n711\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n712\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n713\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n714\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n715\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n716\t        ));\n717\t    }\n718\t\n719\t    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n720\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n721\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n722\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n723\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n724\t            acks >= quorum\n725\t        })\n726\t        .unwrap_or(0);\n727\t\n728\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n729\t    let miroir_task = state\n730\t        .task_registry\n731\t        .register_with_metadata(\n732\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n733\t            Some(index.clone()),\n734\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n735\t        )\n736\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n737\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n738\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n739\t        ))?;\n740\t\n741\t    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n742\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n743\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n744\t            sid,\n745\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n746\t            first_quorum_group,\n747\t        ).await {\n748\t            tracing::error!(\n749\t                session_id = %sid,\n750\t                error = %e,\n751\t                \"failed to record session pinning for delete by filter\"\n752\t            );\n753\t        }\n754\t    }\n755\t\n756\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n757\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n758\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n759\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n760\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n761\t            error: None,\n762\t            error_type: None,\n763\t            code: None,\n764\t            link: None,\n765\t        },\n766\t        degraded_groups,\n767\t    )\n768\t}\n769\t\n770\t/// Extract primary key from a document by checking common field names.\n771\t///\n772\t/// Tries fields in order: id, pk, key, _id.\n773\tfn extract_primary_key(doc: &Value) -> Option<String> {\n774\t    [\"id\", \"pk\", \"key\", \"_id\"]\n775\t        .iter()\n776\t        .find(|&&key| doc.get(key).is_some())\n777\t        .map(|&s| s.to_string())\n778\t}\n779\t\n780\t/// Group documents by their target shard for fan-out optimization.\n781\t///\n782\t/// Returns a map of shard_id -> documents to send to that shard.\n783\t/// The caller then fans out each shard's documents to all RF nodes in each group.\n784\t///\n785\t/// This per-batch grouping minimizes HTTP fan-out count (critical at scale).\n786\tfn group_documents_by_shard(\n787\t    documents: &[Value],\n788\t    primary_key: &str,\n789\t    topology: &Topology,\n790\t) -> std::result::Result<HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>>, MeilisearchError> {\n791\t    let mut shard_documents: HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n792\t\n793\t    for doc in documents {\n794\t        let pk_value = doc\n795\t            .get(primary_key)\n796\t            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n797\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n798\t                MeilisearchError::new(\n799\t                    MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n800\t                    \"primary key value must be a string\",\n801\t                )\n802\t            })?;\n803\t\n804\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, topology.shards);\n805\t        shard_documents\n806\t            .entry(shard_id)\n807\t            .or_default()\n808\t            .push(doc.clone());\n809\t    }\n810\t\n811\t    Ok(shard_documents)\n812\t}\n813\t\n814\t/// Build an error response from a node error.\n815\tfn build_error_response(resp: WriteResponse) -> DocumentsWriteResponse {\n816\t    DocumentsWriteResponse {\n817\t        taskUid: resp.task_uid.map(|uid| uid.to_string()),\n818\t        indexUid: None,\n819\t        status: None,\n820\t        error: resp.message,\n821\t        error_type: resp.error_type,\n822\t        code: resp.code,\n823\t        link: None,\n824\t    }\n825\t}\n826\t\n827\t/// Build a success response with optional X-Miroir-Degraded header.\n828\tfn build_response_with_degraded_header(\n829\t    response: DocumentsWriteResponse,\n830\t    degraded_groups: u32,\n831\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n832\t    let body = serde_json::to_string(&response).map_err(|e| {\n833\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n834\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n835\t            format!(\"failed to serialize response: {}\", e),\n836\t        )\n837\t    })?;\n838\t\n839\t    let mut builder = Response::builder()\n840\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n841\t        .header(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\");\n842\t\n843\t    // Add X-Miroir-Degraded header if any groups were degraded\n844\t    if degraded_groups > 0 {\n845\t        builder = builder.header(HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED, format!(\"groups={}\", degraded_groups));\n846\t    }\n847\t\n848\t    Ok(builder\n849\t        .body(axum::body::Body::from(body))\n850\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n851\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n852\t            format!(\"failed to build response: {}\", e),\n853\t        ))?)\n854\t}\n855\t\n856\t/// Build an error response as JSON (for forwarded node errors).\n857\tfn build_json_error_response(resp: DocumentsWriteResponse) -> Response {\n858\t    (\n859\t        StatusCode::OK,\n860\t        [(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\")],\n861\t        Json(resp),\n862\t    )\n863\t        .into_response()\n864\t}\n865\t\n866\t#[cfg(test)]\n867\tmod tests {\n868\t    use super::*;\n869\t    use miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\n870\t    use address.trim_end_matches('/'),\n188\t            index_uid\n189\t        );\n190\t\n191\t        let mut body = serde_json::json!({\n192\t            \"q\": term,\n193\t            \"limit\": .client\n202\t            .post(&url)\n203\t            .header(\"Authorization\", format!(\"Bearer {}\", self.master_key))\n204\t            .json(&body)\n205\t            .send()\n206\t            .await?;\n207\t\n208\t        if !response.status().is_success() {\n209\t            return Err(format!(\"DF lookup failed: HTTP {}\", response.status()).into());\n210\t        }\n211\t\n212\t        let json: Value = response.json().await?;\n213\t        json.get(\"estimatedTotalHits\")\n214\t            .and_then(|v| v.as_u64())\n215\t            .ok_or_else(|| \"Failed to parse estimatedTotalHits\".into())\n216\t    }\n217\t\n218\t    /// Estimate average document length by sampling a few documents.\n219\t    pub async fn estimate_avg_doc_length(\n220\t        &self,\n221\t        address: &str,\n222\t        index_uid: &str,\n223\t    ) -> Result<f64, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {\n224\t        let url = format!(\n225\t            \"{}/indexes/{}/documents\",\n226\t            address.trim_end_matches('/'),\n227\t            index_uid\n228\t        );\n229\t\n230\t        let response = self\n231\t            .client\n232\t            .get(&url)\n233\t            .header(\"Authorization\", format!(\"Bearer {}\", self.master_key))\n234\t            .query(&[(\"limit\", \"10\")])\n235\t            .send()\n236\t            .await?;\n237\t\n238\t        if !response.status().is_success() {\n239\t            return Ok(500.0);\n240\t        }\n241\t\n242\t        let json: Value = response.json().await?;\n243\t        let results = json.get(\"results\").and_then(|v| v.as_array());\n244\t\n245\t        if let Some(docs) = results {\n246\t            if docs.is_empty() {\n247\t                return Ok(500.0);\n248\t            }\n249\t\n250\t            let mut total_length = 0u64;\n251\t            let mut field_count = 0u64;\n252\t\n253\t            for doc in docs {\n254\t                if let Some(obj) = doc.as_object() {\n255\t                    for (_key, value) in obj {\n256\t                        if let Some(s) = value.as_str() {\n257\t                            total_length += s.len() as u64;\n258\t                            field_count += 1;\n259\t                        }\n260\t                    }\n261\t                }\n262\t            }\n263\t\n264\t            if field_count > 0 {\n265\t                return Ok(total_length as f64 / field_count as f64);\n266\t            }\n267\t        }\n268\t\n269\t        Ok(500.0)\n270\t    }\n271\t}\n272\t\n273\t/// Collect all healthy node addresses from config.\n274\tfn all_node_addresses(config: &Config) -> Vec<String> {\n275\t    config.nodes.iter().map(|n| n.address.clone()).collect()\n276\t}\n277\t\n278\t/// Compute a fingerprint (SHA256) of settings as canonical JSON.\n279\t///\n280\t/// Canonical JSON sorts object keys to ensure consistent fingerprints\n281\t/// regardless of key ordering in the input.\n282\tfn fingerprint_settings(settings: &Value) -> String {\n283\t    // Canonicalize: sort object keys, no extra whitespace.\n284\t    let canonical = if settings.is_object() {\n285\t        if let Some(obj) = settings.as_object() {\n286\t            // Collect and sort keys.\n287\t            let mut sorted_entries: Vec<_> = obj.iter().collect();\n288\t            sorted_entries.sort_by_key(|&(k, _)| k);\n289\t            // Reconstruct as a Map with sorted keys.\n290\t            let mut sorted_map = serde_json::Map::new();\n291\t            for (key, value) in sorted_entries {\n292\t                sorted_map.insert(key.clone(), value.clone());\n293\t            }\n294\t            serde_json::to_string(&sorted_map).unwrap_or_default()\n295\t        } else {\n296\t            serde_json::to_string(settings).unwrap_or_default()\n297\t        }\n298\t    } else {\n299\t        serde_json::to_string(settings).unwrap_or_default()\n300\t    };\n301\t\n302\t    // SHA256 hash.\n303\t    let mut hasher = Sha256::new();\n304\t    hasher.update(canonical.as_bytes());\n305\t    format!(\"{:x}\", hasher.finalize())\n306\t}\n307\t\n308\tpub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\n309\twhere\n310\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n311\t{\n312\t    Router::new()\n313\t        .route(\"/\", post(create_index_handler).get(list_indexes_handler))\n314\t        .route(\n315\t            \"/:index\",\n316\t            get(get_index_handler)\n317\t                .patch(update_index_handler)\n318\t                .delete(delete_index_handler),\n319\t        )\n320\t        .route(\"/:index/stats\", get(get_index_stats_handler))\n321\t        .route(\n322\t            \"/:index/settings\",\n323\t            get(get_settings_handler).patch(update_settings_handler),\n324\t        )\n325\t        .route(\n326\t            \"/:index/settings/*subpath\",\n327\t            get(get_settings_subpath_handler).patch(update_settings_subpath_handler),\n328\t        )\n329\t        .route(\"/:index/_preflight\", post(preflight_handler))\n330\t        .nest(\"/:index/documents\", documents::router::<S>())\n331\t}\n332\t\n333\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n334\t// POST /indexes — create index (broadcast + _miroir_shard)\n335\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n336\t\n337\tasync fn create_index_handler(\n338\t    Extension(_state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n339\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n340\t    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n341\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, MeilisearchError> {\n342\t    let uid = body\n343\t        .get(\"uid\")\n344\t        .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n345\t        .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(\n346\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n347\t            \"index creation requires a `uid` field\",\n348\t        ))?;\n349\t\n350\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n351\t    let nodes = all_node_addresses(&config);\n352\t    let mut created_on: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n353\t    let mut first_response: Option<Value> = None;\n354\t\n355\t    // Phase 1: Create index on every node sequentially\n356\t    for address in &nodes {\n357\t        match client.post_raw(address, \"/indexes\", &body).await {\n358\t            Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n359\t                if first_response.is_none() {\n360\t                    first_response = serde_json::from_str(&text).ok();\n361\t                }\n362\t                created_on.push(address.clone());\n363\t            }\n364\t            Ok((status, text)) => {\n365\t                // Rollback: delete index on all previously created nodes\n366\t                rollback_delete_index(&client, uid, &created_on).await;\n367\t                let msg = format!(\n368\t                    \"index creation failed on node {}: HTTP {} — {}\",\n369\t                    address, status, text\n370\t                );\n371\t                return Err(forward_or_miroir(status, &text, &msg));\n372\t            }\n373\t            Err(e) => {\n374\t                rollback_delete_index(&client, uid, &created_on).await;\n375\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n376\t                    MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n377\t                    format!(\"index creation failed on node {}: {}\", address, e),\n378\t                ));\n379\t            }\n380\t        }\n381\t    }\n382\t\n383\t    // Phase 2: Add `_miroir_shard` and `_miroir_expires_at` to filterableAttributes on every node.\n384\t    // Read current filterableAttributes from first node, merge reserved fields,\n385\t    // then broadcast the merged list to all nodes (plan §13.5 two-phase broadcast).\n386\t    let mut merged_attrs: Vec<Value> = vec![serde_json::json!(\"_miroir_shard\")];\n387\t\n388\t    // Add `_miroir_expires_at` when TTL is enabled (plan §13.14)\n389\t    if config.ttl.enabled {\n390\t        merged_attrs.push(serde_json::json!(config.ttl.expires_at_field));\n391\t    }\n392\t\n393\t    if let Some(first_addr) = nodes.first() {\n394\t        match client.get_raw(first_addr, &format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", uid)).await {\n395\t            Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n396\t                if let Ok(settings) = serde_json::from_str::<Value>(&text) {\n397\t                    if let Some(existing) = settings.get(\"filterableAttributes\").and_then(|v| v.as_array()) {\n398\t                        for attr in existing {\n399\t                            let attr_str = attr.as_str().unwrap_or(\"\");\n400\t                            if attr_str != \"_miroir_shard\" && !attr_str.is_empty() {\n401\t                                merged_attrs.push(attr.clone());\n402\t                            }\n403\t                        }\n404\t                    }\n405\t                }\n406\t            }\n407\t            _ => {}\n408\t        }\n409\t    }\n410\t\n411\t    let filterable_patch = serde_json::json!({\n412\t        \"filterableAttributes\": merged_attrs\n413\t    });\n414\t\n415\t    let mut patch_ok: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n416\t    for address in &nodes {\n417\t        let path = format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", uid);\n418\t        match client.patch_raw(address, &path, &filterable_patch).await {\n419\t            Ok((_status, _text)) if _status >= 200 && _status < 300 => {\n420\t                patch_ok.push(address.clone());\n421\t            }\n422\t            Ok((status, _text)) => {\n423\t                tracing::warn!(\n424\t                    node = %address,\n425\t                    status,\n426\t                    \"failed to set _miroir_shard filterable\"\n427\t                );\n428\t            }\n429\t            Err(e) => {\n430\t                tracing::warn!(\n431\t                    node = %address,\n432\t                    error = %e,\n433\t                    \"failed to set _miroir_shard filterable\"\n434\t                );\n435\t            }\n436\t        }\n437\t    }\n438\t\n439\t    if patch_ok.len() != nodes.len() {\n440\t        tracing::warn!(\n441\t            created = patch_ok.len(),\n442\t            total = nodes.len(),\n443\t            \"_miroir_shard filterableAttributes not set on all nodes\"\n444\t        );\n445\t    }\n446\t\n447\t    tracing::info!(\n448\t        index_uid = uid,\n449\t        nodes = nodes.len(),\n450\t        \"index created on all nodes\"\n451\t    );\n452\t\n453\t    Ok(Json(first_response.unwrap_or(serde_json::json!({\"uid\": uid, \"status\": \"created\"}))))\n454\t}\n455\t\n456\tasync fn rollback_delete_index(client: &MeilisearchClient, uid: &str, nodes: &[String]) {\n457\t    for address in nodes {\n458\t        let path = format!(\"/indexes/{}\", uid);\n459\t        match client.delete_raw(address, &path).await {\n460\t            Ok(_) => tracing::info!(node = %address, \"rollback: deleted index\"),\n461\t            Err(e) => tracing::error!(node = %address, error = %e, \"rollback: failed to delete index\"),\n462\t        }\n463\t    }\n464\t}\n465\t\n466\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n467\t// GET /indexes — list indexes (proxy to first node)\n468\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n469\t\n470\tasync fn list_indexes_handler(\n471\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n472\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, StatusCode> {\n473\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n474\t    let address = config.nodes.first().ok_or(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE)?;\n475\t    let (status, text) = client.get_raw(&address.address, \"/indexes\").await.map_err(|e| {\n476\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"list indexes failed\");\n477\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n478\t    })?;\n479\t    if status >= 200 && status < 300 {\n480\t        let json: Value = serde_json::from_str(&text).unwrap_or(serde_json::json!({\"results\": []}));\n481\t        Ok(Json(json))\n482\t    } else {\n483\t        Err(StatusCode::from_u16(status).unwrap_or(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR))\n484\t    }\n485\t}\n486\t\n487\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n488\t// GET /indexes/{uid} — get single index (proxy)\n489\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n490\t\n491\tasync fn get_index_handler(\n492\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n493\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n494\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, StatusCode> {\n495\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n496\t    let address = config.nodes.first().ok_or(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE)?;\n497\t    let path = format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index);\n498\t    let (status, text) = client.get_raw(&address.address, &path).await.map_err(|e| {\n499\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"get index failed\");\n500\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n501\t    })?;\n502\t    if status >= 200 && status < 300 {\n503\t        Ok(Json(serde_json::from_str(&text).unwrap_or(Value::Null)))\n504\t    } else {\n505\t        Err(StatusCode::from_u16(status).unwrap_or(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR))\n506\t    }\n507\t}\n508\t\n509\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n510\t// PATCH /indexes/{uid} — update index metadata (broadcast with rollback)\n511\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n512\t\n513\tasync fn update_index_handler(\n514\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n515\t    Extension(_state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n516\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n517\t    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n518\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, MeilisearchError> {\n519\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n520\t    let nodes = all_node_addresses(&config);\n521\t    let path = format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index);\n522\t\n523\t    // Snapshot current index state from all nodes before applying changes\n524\t    let mut snapshots: Vec<(String, Value)> = Vec::new();\n525\t    for address in &nodes {\n526\t        match client.get_raw(address, &path).await {\n527\t            Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n528\t                let snapshot: Value = serde_json::from_str(&text).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n529\t                snapshots.push((address.clone(), snapshot));\n530\t            }\n531\t            Ok((status, text)) => {\n532\t                return Err(forward_or_miroir(\n533\t                    status,\n534\t                    &text,\n535\t                    &format!(\"failed to snapshot index on {}: HTTP {}\", address, status),\n536\t                ));\n537\t            }\n538\t            Err(e) => {\n539\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n540\t                    MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n541\t                    format!(\"failed to snapshot index on {}: {}\", address, e),\n542\t                ));\n543\t            }\n544\t        }\n545\t    }\n546\t\n547\t    // Apply update sequentially to each node\n548\t    let mut applied: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n549\t    let mut first_response: Option<Value> = None;\n550\t\n551\t    for (address, _) in &snapshots {\n552\t        match client.patch_raw(address, &path, &body).await {\n553\t            Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n554\t                if first_response.is_none() {\n555\t                    first_response = serde_json::from_str(&text).ok();\n556\t                }\n557\t                applied.push(address.clone());\n558\t            }\n559\t            Ok((status, text)) => {\n560\t                rollback_index_update(&client, &path, &snapshots, &applied).await;\n561\t                let msg = format!(\n562\t                    \"index update failed on {}: HTTP {} — {}\",\n563\t                    address, status, text\n564\t                );\n565\t                return Err(forward_or_miroir(status, &text, &msg));\n566\t            }\n567\t            Err(e) => {\n568\t                rollback_index_update(&client, &path, &snapshots, &applied).await;\n569\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n570\t                    MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n571\t                    format!(\"index update failed on {}: {}\", address, e),\n572\t                ));\n573\t            }\n574\t        }\n575\t    }\n576\t\n577\t    Ok(Json(first_response.unwrap_or(serde_json::json!({\"uid\": index, \"status\": \"updated\"}))))\n578\t}\n579\t\n580\t/// Rollback index metadata updates by restoring pre-change snapshots.\n581\tasync fn rollback_index_update(\n582\t    client: &MeilisearchClient,\n583\t    path: &str,\n584\t    snapshots: &[(String, Value)],\n585\t    applied: &[String],\n586\t) {\n587\t    for address in applied {\n588\t        if let Some((_, snapshot)) = snapshots.iter().find(|(a, _)| a == address) {\n589\t            match client.patch_raw(address, path, snapshot).await {\n590\t                Ok((_status, _text)) if _status >= 200 && _status < 300 => {\n591\t                    tracing::info!(node = %address, \"index update rollback succeeded\");\n592\t                }\n593\t                Ok((status, _text)) => {\n594\t                    tracing::error!(\n595\t                        node = %address,\n596\t                        status,\n597\t                        \"index update rollback failed\"\n598\t                    );\n599\t                }\n600\t                Err(e) => {\n601\t                    tracing::error!(node = %address, error = %e, \"index update rollback failed\");\n602\t                }\n603\t            }\n604\t        }\n605\t    }\n606\t}\n607\t\n608\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n609\t// DELETE /indexes/{uid} — broadcast delete\n610\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n611\t\n612\tasync fn delete_index_handler(\n613\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n614\t    Extension(_state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n615\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n616\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, MeilisearchError> {\n617\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n618\t    let nodes = all_node_addresses(&config);\n619\t    let mut first_response: Option<Value> = None;\n620\t    let mut errors: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n621\t\n622\t    for address in &nodes {\n623\t        let path = format!(\"/indexes/{}\", index);\n624\t        match client.delete_raw(address, &path).await {\n625\t            Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n626\t                if first_response.is_none() {\n627\t                    first_response = serde_json::from_str(&text).ok();\n628\t                }\n629\t            }\n630\t            Ok((status, text)) => {\n631\t                errors.push(format!(\"{}: HTTP {} — {}\", address, status, text));\n632\t            }\n633\t            Err(e) => {\n634\t                errors.push(format!(\"{}: {}\", address, e));\n635\t            }\n636\t        }\n637\t    }\n638\t\n639\t    if !errors.is_empty() && first_response.is_none() {\n640\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n641\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n642\t            format!(\"index deletion failed on all nodes: {}\", errors.join(\"; \")),\n643\t        ));\n644\t    }\n645\t\n646\t    if !errors.is_empty() {\n647\t        tracing::warn!(\n648\t            index_uid = %index,\n649\t            errors = errors.len(),\n650\t            \"index deletion partially failed\"\n651\t        );\n652\t    }\n653\t\n654\t    Ok(Json(first_response.unwrap_or(serde_json::json!({\"taskUid\": 0, \"status\": \"enqueued\"}))))\n655\t}\n656\t\n657\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n658\t// GET /indexes/{uid}/stats — fan out, aggregate\n659\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n660\t\n661\tasync fn get_index_stats_handler(\n662\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n663\t    Extension(_state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n664\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n665\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, MeilisearchError> {\n666\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n667\t    let nodes = all_node_addresses(&config);\n668\t\n669\t    let mut total_docs: u64 = 0;\n670\t    let mut field_distribution: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n671\t    let mut success_count = 0;\n672\t\n673\t    for address in &nodes {\n674\t        match client.get_index_stats(address, &index).await {\n675\t            Ok(stats) => {\n676\t                success_count += 1;\n677\t                if let Some(n) = stats.get(\"numberOfDocuments\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64()) {\n678\t                    total_docs += n;\n679\t                }\n680\t                if let Some(fd) = stats.get(\"fieldDistribution\").and_then(|v| v.as_object()) {\n681\t                    for (field, count) in fd {\n682\t                        if let Some(c) = count.as_u64() {\n683\t                            *field_distribution.entry(field.clone()).or_insert(0) += c;\n684\t                        }\n685\t                    }\n686\t                }\n687\t            }\n688\t            Err(e) => {\n689\t                tracing::warn!(node = %address, error = %e, \"stats fan-out failed\");\n690\t            }\n691\t        }\n692\t    }\n693\t\n694\t    if success_count == 0 {\n695\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n696\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n697\t            format!(\"stats unavailable for index `{}`: all nodes failed\", index),\n698\t        ));\n699\t    }\n700\t\n701\t    // Compute logical doc count: total_docs / (RG × RF)\n702\t    let rg = config.replica_groups as u64;\n703\t    let rf = config.replication_factor as u64;\n704\t    let divisor = rg * rf;\n705\t    let logical_docs = if divisor > 0 { total_docs / divisor } else { total_docs };\n706\t\n707\t    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({\n708\t        \"numberOfDocuments\": logical_docs,\n709\t        \"isIndexing\": false,\n710\t        \"fieldDistribution\": field_distribution,\n711\t    })))\n712\t}\n713\t\n714\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n715\t// GET /stats — global stats across all indexes\n716\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n717\t\n718\tpub async fn global_stats_handler(\n719\t    Extension(_state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n720\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n721\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, MeilisearchError> {\n722\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n723\t    let nodes = all_node_addresses(&config);\n724\t\n725\t    // Get list of indexes from first node\n726\t    let first_address = nodes.first().ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(\n727\t        MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n728\t        \"no nodes configured\",\n729\t    ))?;\n730\t\n731\t    let (status, text) = client.get_raw(first_address, \"/indexes\").await.map_err(|e| {\n732\t        MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::NoQuorum, format!(\"failed to list indexes: {}\", e))\n733\t    })?;\n734\t\n735\t    if status < 200 || status >= 300 {\n736\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::NoQuorum, \"failed to list indexes\"));\n737\t    }\n738\t\n739\t    let indexes: Value = serde_json::from_str(&text).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n740\t    let index_list = indexes\n741\t        .get(\"results\")\n742\t        .and_then(|v| v.as_array())\n743\t        .cloned()\n744\t        .unwrap_or_default();\n745\t\n746\t    let mut total_docs: u64 = 0;\n747\t    let mut total_field_distribution: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n748\t\n749\t    for idx in &index_list {\n750\t        if let Some(uid) = idx.get(\"uid\").and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n751\t            for address in &nodes {\n752\t                match client.get_index_stats(address, uid).await {\n753\t                    Ok(stats) => {\n754\t                        if let Some(n) = stats.get(\"numberOfDocuments\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64()) {\n755\t                            total_docs += n;\n756\t                        }\n757\t                        if let Some(fd) = stats.get(\"fieldDistribution\").and_then(|v| v.as_object()) {\n758\t                            for (field, count) in fd {\n759\t                                if let Some(c) = count.as_u64() {\n760\t                                    *total_field_distribution.entry(field.clone()).or_insert(0) += c;\n761\t                                }\n762\t                            }\n763\t                        }\n764\t                    }\n765\t                    Err(_) => {}\n766\t                }\n767\t            }\n768\t        }\n769\t    }\n770\t\n771\t    let rg = config.replica_groups as u64;\n772\t    let rf = config.replication_factor as u64;\n773\t    let divisor = rg * rf;\n774\t    let logical_docs = if divisor > 0 { total_docs / divisor } else { total_docs };\n775\t\n776\t    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({\n777\t        \"databaseSize\": 0,\n778\t        \"lastUpdate\": \"\",\n779\t        \"indexes\": {},\n780\t        \"numberOfDocuments\": logical_docs,\n781\t        \"fieldDistribution\": total_field_distribution,\n782\t    })))\n783\t}\n784\t\n785\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n786\t// Settings: PATCH /indexes/{uid}/settings — two-phase broadcast with verification (§13.5)\n787\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n788\t\n789\tasync fn update_settings_handler(\n790\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n791\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n792\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n793\t    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n794\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, MeilisearchError> {\n795\t    two_phase_settings_broadcast(&state, &config, &index, \"/settings\", &body).await\n796\t}\n797\t\n798\tasync fn update_settings_subpath_handler(\n799\t    Path((index, subpath)): Path<(String, String)>,\n800\t    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n801\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n802\t    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n803\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, MeilisearchError> {\n804\t    let path = format!(\"/settings/{}\", subpath);\n805\t    two_phase_settings_broadcast(&state, &config, &index, &path, &body).await\n806\t}\n807\t\n808\t/// Two-phase settings broadcast (§13.5):\n809\t/// Phase 1 (Propose): PATCH all nodes in parallel, collect task UIDs\n810\t/// Phase 2 (Verify): GET settings from all nodes, verify SHA256 fingerprints\n811\t/// Phase 3 (Commit): Increment settings_version, persist to task store\n812\t///\n813\t/// On hash mismatch, retry with exponential backoff up to max_repair_retries.\n814\t/// If unrepairable, raise MiroirSettingsDivergence alert and freeze writes.\n815\tasync fn two_phase_settings_broadcast(\n816\t    state: &AppState,\n817\t    config: &Config,\n818\t    index: &str,\n819\t    settings_path: &str,\n820\t    body: &Value,\n821\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, MeilisearchError> {\n822\t    // Use sequential strategy for rollback compatibility\n823\t    if config.settings_broadcast.strategy == \"sequential\" {\n824\t        return update_settings_broadcast_legacy(&config, index, settings_path, body).await;\n825\t    }\n826\t\n827\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n828\t    let nodes = all_node_addresses(config);\n829\t    let full_path = format!(\"/indexes/{}{}\", index, settings_path);\n830\t\n831\t    // Check if a broadcast is already in flight\n832\t    if state.settings_broadcast.is_in_flight(index).await {\n833\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n834\t            MiroirCode::IndexAlreadyExists,\n835\t            format!(\"settings broadcast already in flight for index '{}'\", index),\n836\t        ));\n837\t    }\n838\t\n839\t    // Compute expected fingerprint of proposed settings\n840\t    let expected_fingerprint = fingerprint_settings(body);\n841\t\n842\t    // Set phase to Propose (1)\n843\t    state.metrics.set_settings_broadcast_phase(index, 1);\n844\t\n845\t    // Phase 1: Propose - PATCH all nodes in parallel\n846\t    let propose_fut = async {\n847\t        let mut node_task_uids = HashMap::new();\n848\t        let mut first_response: Option<Value> = None;\n849\t        let mut errors: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n850\t\n851\t        for address in &nodes {\n852\t            match client.patch_raw(address, &full_path, body).await {\n853\t                Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n854\t                    if first_response.is_none() {\n855\t                        first_response = serde_json::from_str(&text).ok();\n856\t                    }\n857\t                    // Extract taskUid if present in response\n858\t                    if let Ok(resp) = serde_json::from_str::<Value>(&text) {\n859\t                        if let Some(task_uid) = resp.get(\"taskUid\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64()) {\n860\t                            node_task_uids.insert(address.clone(), task_uid);\n861\t                        }\n862\t                    }\n863\t                }\n864\t                Ok((status, text)) => {\n865\t                    errors.push(format!(\"{}: HTTP {} — {}\", address, status, text));\n866\t                }\n867\t                Err(e) => {\n868\t                    errors.push(format!(\"{}: {}\", address, e));\n869\t                }\n870\t            }\n871\t        }\n872\t\n873\t        (node_task_uids, first_response, errors)\n874\t    };\n875\t\n876\t    let (node_task_uids, first_response, propose_errors) = propose_fut.await;\n877\t\n878\t    if !propose_errors.is_empty() {\n879\t        state.metrics.clear_settings_broadcast_phase(index);\n880\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n881\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n882\t            format!(\"Phase 1 propose failed: {}\", propose_errors.join(\"; \")),\n883\t        ));\n884\t    }\n885\t\n886\t    // Start broadcast tracking\n887\t    state.settings_broadcast.start_propose(index.to_string(), body).await\n888\t        .map_err(convert_miroir_error)?;\n889\t\n890\t    // Set phase to Verify (2)\n891\t    state.metrics.set_settings_broadcast_phase(index, 2);\n892\t\n893\t    // Wait for all node tasks to complete (with timeout)\n894\t    let verify_timeout = Duration::from_secs(config.settings_broadcast.verify_timeout_s);\n895\t\n896\t    // Define verify logic as a closure that can be called multiple times\n897\t    // Uses parallel execution for performance (P5.5.b)\n898\t    let run_verify = || {\n899\t        let client = client.clone();\n900\t        let nodes = nodes.clone();\n901\t        let index = index.to_string();\n902\t        let settings_path = settings_path.to_string();\n903\t        async move {\n904\t            // Parallel verification: spawn GET requests to all nodes concurrently\n905\t            let verify_tasks: Vec<_> = nodes.iter().map(|address| {\n906\t                let client = client.clone();\n907\t                let address = address.clone();\n908\t                let path = format!(\"/indexes/{}{}\", index, settings_path);\n909\t                async move {\n910\t                    (address.clone(), client.get_raw(&address, &path).await)\n911\t                }\n912\t            }).collect();\n913\t\n914\t            let results: Vec<(String, Result<(u16, String), String>)> = join_all(verify_tasks).await;\n915\t\n916\t            let mut node_hashes = HashMap::new();\n917\t            let mut verify_errors: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n918\t\n919\t            for (address, result) in results {\n920\t                match result {\n921\t                    Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n922\t                        if let Ok(settings) = serde_json::from_str::<Value>(&text) {\n923\t                            let hash = fingerprint_settings(&settings);\n924\t                            node_hashes.insert(address, hash);\n925\t                        }\n926\t                    }\n927\t                    Ok((status, text)) => {\n928\t                        verify_errors.push(format!(\"{}: HTTP {} — {}\", address, status, text));\n929\t                    }\n930\t                    Err(e) => {\n931\t                        verify_errors.push(format!(\"{}: {}\", address, e));\n932\t                    }\n933\t                }\n934\t            }\n935\t\n936\t            (node_hashes, verify_errors)\n937\t        }\n938\t    };\n939\t\n940\t    let (mut node_hashes, verify_errors) = timeout(verify_timeout, run_verify())\n941\t        .await\n942\t        .map_err(|_| {\n943\t            MeilisearchError::new(\n944\t                MiroirCode::Timeout,\n945\t                \"Phase 2 verify timed out\",\n946\t            )\n947\t        })?;\n948\t\n949\t    if !verify_errors.is_empty() {\n950\t        state.settings_broadcast.abort(\n951\t            index,\n952\t            format!(\"Phase 2 verify failed: {}\", verify_errors.join(\"; \")),\n953\t        ).await.ok();\n954\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n955\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n956\t            format!(\"Phase 2 verify failed: {}\", verify_errors.join(\"; \")),\n957\t        ));\n958\t    }\n959\t\n960\t    // Enter verify phase and check hashes\n961\t    state.settings_broadcast.enter_verify(index, node_task_uids.clone()).await\n962\t        .map_err(convert_miroir_error)?;\n963\t\n964\t    // Retry loop with exponential backoff for hash mismatches\n965\t    let mut retry_count = 0u32;\n966\t    let max_retries = config.settings_broadcast.max_repair_retries;\n967\t\n968\t    loop {\n969\t        match state.settings_broadcast.verify_hashes(\n970\t            index,\n971\t            node_hashes.clone(),\n972\t            &expected_fingerprint,\n973\t        ).await {\n974\t            Ok(()) => break,\n975\t            Err(miroir_core::error::MiroirError::SettingsDivergence) => {\n976\t                state.metrics.inc_settings_hash_mismatch();\n977\t                retry_count += 1;\n978\t                if retry_count > max_retries {\n979\t                    state.settings_broadcast.abort(\n980\t                        index,\n981\t                        format!(\"max repair retries ({}) exceeded\", max_retries),\n982\t                    ).await.ok();\n983\t\n984\t                    // Freeze writes on this index if configured\n985\t                    if config.settings_broadcast.freeze_writes_on_unrepairable {\n986\t                        state.metrics.freeze_index_writes(index);\n987\t                        tracing::error!(\n988\t                            index = %index,\n989\t                            retries = max_retries,\n990\t                            \"settings divergence unrepairable - freezing writes on index\"\n991\t                        );\n992\t                    }\n993\t\n994\t                    // Raise MiroirSettingsDivergence alert\n995\t                    state.metrics.raise_settings_divergence_alert(index);\n996\t\n997\t                    return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n998\t                        MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n999\t                        format!(\"settings divergence detected after {} retries - writes frozen on index\", max_retries),\n1000\t                    ));\n1001\t                }\n1002\t\n1003\t                // Exponential backoff: 2^retry_count seconds, max 60s\n1004\t                let backoff_ms = 1000 * (1u64 << (retry_count - 1).min(5));\n1005\t                tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_millis(backoff_ms)).await;\n1006\t\n1007\t                // Identify mismatched nodes and reissue PATCH to them\n1008\t                let mismatched_nodes: Vec<_> = node_hashes.iter()\n1009\t                    .filter(|(_, hash)| hash.as_str() != expected_fingerprint)\n1010\t                    .map(|(node, _)| node.clone())\n1011\t                    .collect();\n1012\t\n1013\t                tracing::warn!(\n1014\t                    index = %index,\n1015\t                    retry = retry_count,\n1016\t                    mismatched_nodes = ?mismatched_nodes,\n1017\t                    \"settings hash mismatch detected - reissuing PATCH to mismatched nodes\"\n1018\t                );\n1019\t\n1020\t                // Reissue PATCH to mismatched nodes (repair)\n1021\t                let mut repair_errors: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n1022\t                for address in &mismatched_nodes {\n1023\t                    match client.patch_raw(address, &full_path, body).await {\n1024\t                        Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n1025\t                            tracing::info!(\n1026\t                                node = %address,\n1027\t                                index = %index,\n1028\t                                retry = retry_count,\n1029\t                                \"successfully reissued settings PATCH\"\n1030\t                            );\n1031\t                        }\n1032\t                        Ok((status, text)) => {\n1033\t                            repair_errors.push(format!(\"{}: HTTP {} — {}\", address, status, text));\n1034\t                        }\n1035\t                        Err(e) => {\n1036\t                            repair_errors.push(format!(\"{}: {}\", address, e));\n1037\t                        }\n1038\t                    }\n1039\t                }\n1040\t\n1041\t                if !repair_errors.is_empty() {\n1042\t                    state.settings_broadcast.abort(\n1043\t                        index,\n1044\t                        format!(\"repair reissue failed: {}\", repair_errors.join(\"; \")),\n1045\t                    ).await.ok();\n1046\t                    return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n1047\t                        MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n1048\t                        format!(\"repair reissue failed: {}\", repair_errors.join(\"; \")),\n1049\t                    ));\n1050\t                }\n1051\t\n1052\t                // Re-run verify phase after repair\n1053\t                let (new_hashes, new_errors) = run_verify().await;\n1054\t                if !new_errors.is_empty() {\n1055\t                    state.settings_broadcast.abort(\n1056\t                        index,\n1057\t                        format!(\"re-verify failed: {}\", new_errors.join(\"; \")),\n1058\t                    ).await.ok();\n1059\t                    return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n1060\t                        MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n1061\t                        format!(\"re-verify failed: {}\", new_errors.join(\"; \")),\n1062\t                    ));\n1063\t                }\n1064\t                node_hashes = new_hashes;\n1065\t            }\n1066\t            Err(e) => {\n1067\t                state.settings_broadcast.abort(index, e.to_string()).await.ok();\n1068\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n1069\t                    MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n1070\t                    e.to_string(),\n1071\t                ));\n1072\t            }\n1073\t        }\n1074\t    }\n1075\t\n1076\t    // Phase 3: Commit - increment settings version\n1077\t    let new_version = state.settings_broadcast.commit(index).await\n1078\t        .map_err(convert_miroir_error)?;\n1079\t\n1080\t    // Update settings version metric\n1081\t    state.metrics.set_settings_version(index, new_version);\n1082\t    state.metrics.clear_settings_broadcast_phase(index);\n1083\t\n1084\t    tracing::info!(\n1085\t        index = %index,\n1086\t        settings_version = new_version,\n1087\t        nodes = nodes.len(),\n1088\t        \"settings broadcast committed successfully\"\n1089\t    );\n1090\t\n1091\t    // Complete and remove from in-flight tracking\n1092\t    state.settings_broadcast.complete(index).await.ok();\n1093\t\n1094\t    Ok(Json(first_response.unwrap_or(serde_json::json!({\n1095\t        \"taskUid\": 0,\n1096\t        \"status\": \"enqueued\",\n1097\t        \"settingsVersion\": new_version,\n1098\t    }))))\n1099\t}\n1100\t\n1101\t/// Legacy sequential settings broadcast: apply to nodes one-by-one, rollback on failure.\n1102\t///\n1103\t/// Kept for rollback compatibility when strategy: sequential.\n1104\tasync fn update_settings_broadcast_legacy(\n1105\t    config: &Config,\n1106\t    index: &str,\n1107\t    settings_path: &str,\n1108\t    body: &Value,\n1109\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, MeilisearchError> {\n1110\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n1111\t    let nodes = all_node_addresses(config);\n1112\t    let full_path = format!(\"/indexes/{}{}\", index, settings_path);\n1113\t\n1114\t    // Snapshot current settings from all nodes before applying changes\n1115\t    let mut snapshots: Vec<(String, Value)> = Vec::new();\n1116\t    for address in &nodes {\n1117\t        match client.get_raw(address, &full_path).await {\n1118\t            Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n1119\t                let snapshot: Value = serde_json::from_str(&text).unwrap_or(Value::Null);\n1120\t                snapshots.push((address.clone(), snapshot));\n1121\t            }\n1122\t            Ok((status, text)) => {\n1123\t                return Err(forward_or_miroir(\n1124\t                    status,\n1125\t                    &text,\n1126\t                    &format!(\"failed to snapshot settings on {}: HTTP {}\", address, status),\n1127\t                ));\n1128\t            }\n1129\t            Err(e) => {\n1130\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n1131\t                    MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n1132\t                    format!(\"failed to snapshot settings on {}: {}\", address, e),\n1133\t                ));\n1134\t            }\n1135\t        }\n1136\t    }\n1137\t\n1138\t    // Apply settings sequentially\n1139\t    let mut applied: Vec<String> = Vec::new();\n1140\t    let mut first_response: Option<Value> = None;\n1141\t\n1142\t    for (address, _snapshot) in &snapshots {\n1143\t        match client.patch_raw(address, &full_path, body).await {\n1144\t            Ok((status, text)) if status >= 200 && status < 300 => {\n1145\t                if first_response.is_none() {\n1146\t                    first_response = serde_json::from_str(&text).ok();\n1147\t                }\n1148\t                applied.push(address.clone());\n1149\t            }\n1150\t            Ok((status, text)) => {\n1151\t                // Rollback all previously applied nodes\n1152\t                rollback_settings(&client, &full_path, &snapshots, &applied).await;\n1153\t                let msg = format!(\n1154\t                    \"settings update failed on {}: HTTP {} — {}\",\n1155\t                    address, status, text\n1156\t                );\n1157\t                return Err(forward_or_miroir(status, &text, &msg));\n1158\t            }\n1159\t            Err(e) => {\n1160\t                rollback_settings(&client, &full_path, &snapshots, &applied).await;\n1161\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n1162\t                    MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n1163\t                    format!(\"settings update failed on {}: {}\", address, e),\n1164\t                ));\n1165\t            }\n1166\t        }\n1167\t    }\n1168\t\n1169\t    Ok(Json(first_response.unwrap_or(serde_json::json!({\"taskUid\": 0, \"status\": \"enqueued\"}))))\n1170\t}\n1171\t\n1172\t/// Rollback settings on previously-applied nodes using pre-change snapshots.\n1173\tasync fn rollback_settings(\n1174\t    client: &MeilisearchClient,\n1175\t    full_path: &str,\n1176\t    snapshots: &[(String, Value)],\n1177\t    applied: &[String],\n1178\t) {\n1179\t    for address in applied {\n1180\t        // Find the snapshot for this address\n1181\t        if let Some((_, snapshot)) = snapshots.iter().find(|(a, _)| a == address) {\n1182\t            match client.patch_raw(address, full_path, snapshot).await {\n1183\t                Ok((_status, _text)) if _status >= 200 && _status < 300 => {\n1184\t                    tracing::info!(node = %address, \"settings rollback succeeded\");\n1185\t                }\n1186\t                Ok((status, _text)) => {\n1187\t                    tracing::error!(\n1188\t                        node = %address,\n1189\t                        status,\n1190\t                        \"settings rollback failed\"\n1191\t                    );\n1192\t                }\n1193\t                Err(e) => {\n1194\t                    tracing::error!(node = %address, error = %e, \"settings rollback failed\");\n1195\t                }\n1196\t            }\n1197\t        }\n1198\t    }\n1199\t}\n1200\t\n1201\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n1202\t// GET /indexes/{uid}/settings — proxy to first node\n1203\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n1204\t\n1205\tasync fn get_settings_handler(\n1206\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n1207\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n1208\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, StatusCode> {\n1209\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n1210\t    let address = config.nodes.first().ok_or(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE)?;\n1211\t    let path = format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings\", index);\n1212\t    let (status, text) = client.get_raw(&address.address, &path).await.map_err(|e| {\n1213\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"get settings failed\");\n1214\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n1215\t    })?;\n1216\t    if status >= 200 && status < 300 {\n1217\t        Ok(Json(serde_json::from_str(&text).unwrap_or(Value::Null)))\n1218\t    } else {\n1219\t        Err(StatusCode::from_u16(status).unwrap_or(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR))\n1220\t    }\n1221\t}\n1222\t\n1223\tasync fn get_settings_subpath_handler(\n1224\t    Path((index, subpath)): Path<(String, String)>,\n1225\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n1226\t) -> Result<Json<Value>, StatusCode> {\n1227\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n1228\t    let address = config.nodes.first().ok_or(StatusCode::SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE)?;\n1229\t    let path = format!(\"/indexes/{}/settings/{}\", index, subpath);\n1230\t    let (status, text) = client.get_raw(&address.address, &path).await.map_err(|e| {\n1231\t        tracing::error!(error = %e, \"get settings subpath failed\");\n1232\t        StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n1233\t    })?;\n1234\t    if status >= 200 && status < 300 {\n1235\t        Ok(Json(serde_json::from_str(&text).unwrap_or(Value::Null)))\n1236\t    } else {\n1237\t        Err(StatusCode::from_u16(status).unwrap_or(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR))\n1238\t    }\n1239\t}\n1240\t\n1241\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n1242\t// POST /indexes/{uid}/_preflight — DFS preflight\n1243\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n1244\t\n1245\tasync fn preflight_handler(\n1246\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n1247\t    Extension(config): Extension<Arc<Config>>,\n1248\t    Extension(_topology): Extension<Arc<Topology>>,\n1249\t    Json(body): Json<PreflightRequest>,\n1250\t) -> Result<Json<PreflightResponse>, StatusCode> {\n1251\t    let node = config\n1252\t        .nodes\n1253\t        .first()\n1254\t        .ok_or(StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR)?;\n1255\t\n1256\t    let client = MeilisearchClient::new(config.node_master_key.clone());\n1257\t\n1258\t    let total_docs = client\n1259\t        .get_index_stats(&node.address, &index)\n1260\t        .await\n1261\t        .and_then(|v| {\n1262\t            v.get(\"numberOfDocuments\")\n1263\t                .and_then(|v| v.as_u64())\n1264\t                .ok_or_else(|| \"Failed to parse numberOfDocuments\".into())\n1265\t        })\n1266\t        .map_err(|e| {\n1267\t            tracing::error!(error = %e, \"failed to get index stats\");\n1268\t            StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR\n1269\t        })?;\n1270\t\n1271\t    let avg_doc_length = client\n1272\t        .estimate_avg_doc_length(&node.address, &index)\n1273\t        .await\n1274\t        .unwrap_or(500.0);\n1275\t\n1276\t    let mut term_stats = HashMap::new();\n1277\t    for term in &body.terms {\n1278\t        match client.get_term_df(&node.address, &index, term, &body.filter).await {\n1279\t            Ok(df) => {\n1280\t                term_stats.insert(term.clone(), TermStats { df });\n1281\t            }\n1282\t            Err(e) => {\n1283\t Result merger: combines shard results into a single response.\n2\t//!\n3\t//! Supports pluggable merge strategies via the [`MergeStrategy`] trait.\n4\t//! The default strategy is Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) with k=60.\n5\t\n6\tuse crate::Result;\n7\tuse serde_json::{Map, Value};\n8\tuse std::collections::BTreeMap;\n9\tuse multiple shards are combined\n69\t/// into a single globally-ranked response. The default strategy is\n70\t/// [`RrfStrategy`] (Reciprocal Rank Fusion).\n71\tpub trait MergeStrategy: Send + Sync {\n72\t    /// Merge search results from multiple shards into a single response.\n73\t    fn merge(&self, input: MergeInput) -> Result<MergedSearchResult>;\n74\t\n75\t    /// Strategy name (for logging and `/explain` output).\n76\t    fn name(&self) -> &'static str;\n77\t}\n78\t\n79\t/// Box reference to a merge strategy (for polymorphic dispatch).\n80\tpub type DynMergeStrategy = dyn MergeStrategy;\n81\t\n82\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n83\t// RRF strategy\n84\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n85\t\n86\t/// Default RRF constant k.\n87\t///\n88\t/// The value 60 is recommended in the RRF literature and used by\n89\t/// OpenSearch for hybrid search. Smaller values amplify rank\n90\t/// differences; larger values flatten them.\n91\tpub const DEFAULT_RRF_K: u32 = 60;\n92\t\n93\t/// Reciprocal Rank Fusion merge strategy.\n94\t///\n95\t/// Each document's contribution from a shard is `1 / (k + rank + 1)`\n96\t/// where rank is the 0-based position. Documents appearing in\n97\t/// multiple shards have their contributions summed. Results are\n98\t/// sorted by total RRF score descending, with deterministic\n99\t/// tie-breaking on primary key.\n100\t#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\n101\tpub struct RrfStrategy {\n102\t    k: u32,\n103\t}\n104\t\n105\timpl RrfStrategy {\n106\t    /// Create a new RRF strategy with the given k constant.\n107\t    pub fn new(k: u32) -> Self {\n108\t        Self { k: k.max(1) }\n109\t    }\n110\t\n111\t    /// Create with the default k=60.\n112\t    pub fn default_strategy() -> Self {\n113\t        Self::new(DEFAULT_RRF_K)\n114\t    }\n115\t\n116\t    /// Return the configured k value.\n117\t    pub fn k(&self) -> u32 {\n118\t        self.k\n119\t    }\n120\t}\n121\t\n122\timpl Default for RrfStrategy {\n123\t    fn default() -> Self {\n124\t        Self::default_strategy()\n125\t    }\n126\t}\n127\t\n128\timpl MergeStrategy for RrfStrategy {\n129\t    fn merge(&self, input: MergeInput) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n130\t        rrf_merge(&self.k, input)\n131\t    }\n132\t\n133\t    fn name(&self) -> &'static str {\n134\t        \"rrf\"\n135\t    }\n136\t}\n137\t\n138\t/// A document with its accumulated RRF score.\n139\t#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\n140\tstruct RRFDocument {\n141\t    /// Accumulated RRF score across all shards.\n142\t    rrf_score: f64,\n143\t\n144\t    /// Primary key for tie-breaking.\n145\t    primary_key: String,\n146\t\n147\t    /// The hit document (JSON object) from the highest-ranking shard.\n148\t    hit: Map<String, Value>,\n149\t}\n150\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"call_1cef769ce2694c21a590c1ae","session_id":"155061bd-3642-4d35-b411-174bab6f1e29","uuid":"29d871db-142e-4b07-a286-8185ee13e310","timestamp":"2026-05-23T13:34:05.849Z","subagent_type":"Explore","task_description":"Explore TTL codebase"}

Shard Ownership (Rendezvous Hashing)\n\n**Location:** `/home/coding/miroir/crates/miroir-core/src/router.rs`\n\n### Key Functions:\n\n**`assign_shard_in_group()`** (lines 25-39):\n```rust\npub fn assign_shard_in_group(shard_id: u32, group_nodes: &[NodeId], rf: usize) -> Vec<NodeId> {\n    let mut scored: Vec<(u64, &NodeId)> = group_nodes\n        .iter()\n        .map(|n| (score(shard_id, n.as_str()), n))\n        .collect();\n    scored.sort_unstable_by(|a, b| {\n        b.0.cmp(&a.0)\n            .then_with(|| a.1.as_str().cmp(b.1.as_str()))\n    });\n    scored.into_iter().take(rf).map(|(_, n)| n.clone()).collect()\n}\n```\n\n**Rendezvous Scoring** (lines 12-17):\n- Uses `XxHash64` for deterministic scoring\n- Higher scores win\n- Tie-breaking by node_id lexicographic order\n\n**TTL Uses This Pattern** (ttl.rs lines 212-221):\n```rust\n// Build shard → node mapping using the same rendezvous pattern as query routing\nlet mut shard_to_node: HashMap<u32, NodeId> = HashMap::new();\nfor shard_id in 0..total_shards {\n    let replicas = router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n    if replicas.is_empty() { continue; }\n    // Use query_seq=0 for deterministic selection\n    let selected = replicas[0].clone();\n    shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n}\n```\n\n## 4.
