Document TTL and automatic expiration (plan §13.14).\n//!\n//! Background sweeper deletes documents whose `_miroir_expires_at` field\n//! is in the past.\n//!\n//! # CDC Origin Tag (plan §13.13)\n//!\n//! TTL expiration deletes must be tagged with `origin=\"ttl_expire\"` so they are\n//! suppressed from CDC by default (unless `emit_ttl_deletes` is true).\n//!\n//! When constructing delete requests for expired documents, set:\n//! ```ignore\n//! use miroir_core::cdc::ORIGIN_TTL_EXPIRE;\n//! WriteRequest { ..., origin: Some(ORIGIN_TTL_EXPIRE.to_string()) }\n//! ```\n\nuse crate::cdc::ORIGIN_TTL_EXPIRE;\nuse crate::config::advanced::TtlConfig as AdvancedTtlConfig;\nuse crate::error::{MiroirError, Result};\nuse crate::scatter::{DeleteByFilterRequest, NodeClient};\nuse crate::topology::{Topology, NodeId};\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::json;\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\nuse std::sync::Arc;\nuse std::time::{SystemTime, UNIX_EPOCH};\nuse tokio::sync::RwLock;\nuse tokio::time::{interval, Duration};\nuse tracing::{debug, info, warn};\n\n/// Re-export the config version\npub use crate::config::advanced::{TtlConfig, TtlOverride};\n\n/// TTL sweeper state.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TtlSweeperState {\n    /// Last sweep timestamp.\n    pub last_sweep_at: u64,\n    /// Documents deleted in last sweep.\n    pub last_sweep_deleted: u64,\n    /// Indexes with pending expired documents.\n    pub pending_indexes: Vec<String>,\n}\n\n/// TTL manager.\npub struct TtlManager<C: NodeClient> {\n    /// Configuration.\n    config: TtlConfig,\n    /// Sweeper state.\n    state: Arc<RwLock<TtlSweeperState>>,\n    /// Sweeper running flag.\n    running: Arc<RwLock<bool>>,\n    /// Shared topology.\n    topology: Arc<RwLock<Topology>>,\n    /// HTTP client for node communication.\n    node_client: Arc<C>,\n    /// Total shards in the cluster.\n    total_shards: u32,\n    /// This pod's replica group ID (for Mode A shard-partitioned sweeping).\n    replica_group_id: u32,\n    /// RF (replication factor) for replica selection.\n    rf: usize,\n    /// Metrics callback for documents expired.\n    metrics_expired: Option<Arc<dyn Fn(u64) + Send + Sync>>,\n    /// Metrics callback for sweep duration.\n    metrics_duration: Option<Arc<dyn Fn(f64) + Send + Sync>>,\n}\n\n/// Helper type for boxed metrics callbacks.\ntype MetricsExpiredCallback = Box<dyn Fn(u64) + Send + Sync>;\ntype MetricsDurationCallback = Box<dyn Fn(f64) + Send + Sync>;\n\nimpl<C: NodeClient> TtlManager<C> {\n    /// Create a new TTL manager.\n    pub fn new(\n        config: TtlConfig,\n        topology: Arc<RwLock<Topology>>,\n        node_client: Arc<C>,\n        total_shards: u32,\n        replica_group_id: u32,\n        rf: usize,\n    ) -> Self {\n        Self {\n            config,\n            state: Arc::new(RwLock::new(TtlSweeperState {\n                last_sweep_at: 0,\n                last_sweep_deleted: 0,\n                pending_indexes: Vec::new(),\n            })),\n            running: Arc::new(RwLock::new(false)),\n            topology,\n            node_client,\n            total_shards,\n            replica_group_id,\n            rf,\n            metrics_expired: None,\n            metrics_duration: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Register metrics callbacks.\n    pub fn with_metrics(\n        mut self,\n        expired: MetricsExpiredCallback,\n        duration: MetricsDurationCallback,\n    ) -> Self {\n        self.metrics_expired = Some(Arc::new(expired));\n        self.metrics_duration = Some(Arc::new(duration));\n        self\n    }\n\n    /// Start the background sweeper.\n    pub async fn start(&self) {\n        let mut running = self.running.write().await;\n        if *running {\n            return; // Already running\n        }\n        *running = true;\n        drop(running);\n\n        let config = self.config.clone();\n        let state = self.state.clone();\n        let running_flag = self.running.clone();\n        let topology = self.topology.clone();\n        let node_client = self.node_client.clone();\n        let total_shards = self.total_shards;\n        let replica_group_id = self.replica_group_id;\n        let rf = self.rf;\n        let metrics_expired = self.metrics_expired.clone();\n        let metrics_duration = self.metrics_duration.clone();\n\n        tokio::spawn(async move {\n            let mut timer = interval(Duration::from_secs(config.sweep_interval_s));\n            loop {\n                timer.tick().await;\n\n                // Check if still running\n                {\n                    let running = running_flag.read().await;\n                    if !*running {\n                        break;\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Run sweep\n                let sweep_start = std::time::Instant::now();\n                match Self::run_sweep(\n                    &config,\n                    &state,\n                    &topology,\n                    &node_client,\n                    total_shards,\n                    replica_group_id,\n                    rf,\n                ).await {\n                    Ok(deleted) => {\n                        let duration = sweep_start.elapsed().as_secs_f64();\n                        if let Some(cb) = &metrics_duration {\n                            cb(duration);\n                        }\n                        if deleted > 0 {\n                            if let Some(cb) = &metrics_expired {\n                                cb(deleted);\n                            }\n                        }\n                        info!(\"TTL sweep completed: {} documents deleted in {:.3}s\", deleted, duration);\n                    }\n                    Err(e) => {\n                        warn!(\"TTL sweep failed: {}\", e);\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    /// Stop the background sweeper.\n    pub async fn stop(&self) {\n        let mut running = self.running.write().await;\n        *running = false;\n    }\n\n    /// Run a single sweep pass.\n    ///\n    /// Returns the total number of documents deleted.\n    async fn run_sweep(\n        config: &TtlConfig,\n        state: &Arc<RwLock<TtlSweeperState>>,\n        topology: &Arc<RwLock<Topology>>,\n        node_client: &Arc<C>,\n        total_shards: u32,\n        replica_group_id: u32,\n        rf: usize,\n    ) -> Result<u64> {\n        let now_ms = millis_now();\n        let field = &config.expires_at_field;\n        let max_deletes = config.max_deletes_per_sweep as u64;\n\n        debug!(\"TTL sweep running at {} (max_deletes={})\", now_ms, max_deletes);\n\n        let topo = topology.read().await;\n        let group = match topo.group(replica_group_id) {\n            Some(g) => g,\n            None => {\n                warn!(\"Replica group {} not found in topology\", replica_group_id);\n                return Ok(0);\n            }\n        };\n\n        // Mode A: Each pod sweeps only its rendezvous-owned shards\n        // Build shard → node mapping using the same rendezvous pattern as query routing\n        use crate::router;\n        let mut shard_to_node: HashMap<u32, NodeId> = HashMap::new();\n        for shard_id in 0..total_shards {\n            let replicas = router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n            if replicas.is_empty() {\n                continue;\n            }\n            // Use query_seq=0 for deterministic selection\n            let selected = replicas[0].clone();\n            shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n        }\n\n        let mut total_deleted = 0u64;\n        let mut pending_indexes = Vec::new();\n\n        // Sweep each owned shard\n        for (shard_id, node_id) in shard_to_node {\n            if total_deleted >= max_deletes {\n                debug!(\"Reached max_deletes_per_sweep limit ({})\", max_deletes);\n                break;\n            }\n\n            let node = match topo.node(&node_id) {\n                Some(n) => n,\n                None => continue,\n            };\n\n            // Build filter: _miroir_shard = {s} AND _miroir_expires_at <= {now_ms}\n            let filter = json!({\n                \"filter\": format!(\"{} = {} AND {} <= {}\", \"_miroir_shard\", shard_id, field, now_ms)\n            });\n\n            // NOTE: In production, we would first estimate the count for this shard\n            // using a search query with the filter, then only delete if under the limit.\n            // For this implementation, we proceed directly with deletion.\n\n            // Issue delete request with origin tag for CDC suppression\n            let delete_req = DeleteByFilterRequest {\n                index_uid: \"_all\".to_string(), // Sweep all indexes\n                filter,\n                origin: Some(ORIGIN_TTL_EXPIRE.to_string()),\n            };\n\n            match node_client.delete_documents_by_filter(&node_id, &node.address, &delete_req).await {\n                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n                    // Count deleted documents from response\n                    // In production, this would be returned from Meilisearch\n                    total_deleted = total_deleted.saturating_add(1); // Placeholder count\n                }\n                Ok(resp) => {\n                    warn!(\"Delete request for shard {} failed: {:?}\", shard_id, resp);\n                }\n                Err(e) => {\n                    warn!(\"Error deleting expired docs from shard {}: {:?}\", shard_id, e);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Update state\n        {\n            let mut st = state.write().await;\n            st.last_sweep_at = now_ms;\n            st.last_sweep_deleted = total_deleted;\n            st.pending_indexes = pending_indexes;\n        }\n\n        Ok(total_deleted)\n    }\n\n    /// Get the current sweeper state.\n    pub async fn state(&self) -> TtlSweeperState {\n        self.state.read().await.clone()\n    }\n\n    /// Estimate pending expired documents for an index.\n    ///\n    /// This is a placeholder - in production, this would query the index with\n    /// a filter to count documents with expires_at <= now.\n    pub async fn estimate_pending(&self, _index: &str) -> Result<u64> {\n        // TODO: Implement via search query with filter\n        Ok(0)\n    }\n}\n\n/// Get current UNIX timestamp in milliseconds.\nfn millis_now() -> u64 {\n    SystemTime::now()\n        .duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH)\n        .unwrap_or_default()\n        .as_millis() as u64\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod 2, 2);\n        for i in 0u32..3 {\n            let mut node = Node::new(NodeId::new(format!(\"node-{i}\")), format!(\"http://node-{i}:7700\"), i % 2);\n            node.status = crate::topology::NodeStatus::Active;\n            topo.add_node(node);\n        }\n        topo\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_config_default() {\n        let config = TtlConfig::default();\n        assert!(config.enabled);\n        assert_eq!(config.sweep_interval_s, 300);\n        assert_eq!(config.max_deletes_per_sweep, 10000);\n        assert_eq!(config.expires_at_field, \"_miroir_expires_at\");\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_manager_state() {\n        let topo = Arc::new(RwLock::new(make_test_topology()));\n        let client = 2,\n        );\n        let state = manager.state().await;\n        assert_eq!(state.last_sweep_at, 0);\n        assert_eq!(state.last_sweep_deleted, 0);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_estimate_pending() {\n        let topo = Arc::new(RwLock::new(make_test_topology()));\n        let client = Arc::new(MockNodeClient::default());\n        let manager = TtlManager::new(\n Replicate the logic from AntiEntropyReconciler::is_document_expired\n364\t        if let Some(expires_at) = document.get(\"_miroir_expires_at\").and_then(|v| v.as_u64()) {\n365\t            let now_ms &self,\n379\t    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = Result<u64, miroir_core::error::MiroirError>> + Send;\n380\t}\n381\t\n382\timpl TtlManagerTestExt for TtlManager<MockNodeClient> {\n383\t    fn format!(\"http://node-{i}:7700\"),\n            i % 2,\n        );\n        node.status = miroir_core::topology::NodeStatus::Active;\n        topo.add_node(node);\n    }\n    topo\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Test: Doc with `_miroir_expires_at = now - 1000` is gone after one sweep cycle\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#[tokio::test]\nasync fn test_expired_document_deleted_after_sweep() {\n    let topo = Arc::new(RwLock::new(make_test_topology()));\n    let mut client = MockNodeClient::default();\n\n    // Set up expectation: delete request with filter for expired docs\n    client.expect_delete_by_filter(\n        &NodeId::new(\"node-0\".to_string()),\n        \"http://node-0:7700\",\n        vec![],\n    );\n\n    let ttl_config = TtlConfig {\n        enabled: true,\n test_expires_at_stripped_from_search_hits() {\n    use miroir_core::merger::{MergeInput, MergeStrategy, RrfStrategy, ShardHitPage};\n\n    // Create a hit with _miroir_expires_at field\n    let hit = json!({\n        \"id\": \"doc1\",\n        \"title\": \"Test Document\",\n        \"_miroir_shard\": 5,\n        \"_miroir_expires_at\": 1234567890,\n        \"_rankingScore\": 0.9,\n    });\n\n    let input = MergeInput {\n        shard_hits: vec![ShardHitPage { body: json!({\n            \"hits\": vec![hit],\n            \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1,\n            \"processingTimeMs\": 10,\n        })}],\n        offset: 0,\n        limit: 10,\n        client_requested_score: false,\n        facets: None,\n        failed_shards: vec![],\n    };\n\n    let strategy = RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n    let result = strategy.merge(input).unwrap();\n\n    assert_eq!(result.hits.len(), 1);\n    let doc = &result.hits[0];\n\n    // Verify _miroir_expires_at is stripped\n    assert!(doc.get(\"_miroir_expires_at\").is_none(),\n        \"_miroir_expires_at should be stripped from search hits\");\n\n    // Verify _miroir_shard is also stripped\n Each pod runs a TTL sweeper that deletes expired documents from its\n4\t//! rendezvous-owned shards (Mode A scaling).
